faqs.question: Is C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. fees_and_eligibility.overview: C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology courses stands around INR 2,32,000 to 3,69,600.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission of C.K. Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology (CKPCET) for B.E/B.Tech course without JEE Main. Scores obatined in the Gujarat Common Entrance Test (GUJCET) can also be considered for admissions. Candidates need to complete 10+2 with aggregate of minimum 45% in relevant subjects.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty, strong practical learning, peaceful campus environment at CK Pithawala College.

review_content.Placements: It's more than 60% in GUJCET and over 70% in the Board exam. The most prominent companies recruiting from my course are TCS, Amazon, and L&T. This college is affiliated with GTU. The highest package is 25 lakhs, while the lowest package is 5 lakhs. The highest percentage for internships is above 7.5 CGPA, with companies such as TCS and Narola Infotech participating.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided include labs, classrooms, a library, a canteen, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, and sports. Various events are hosted, offering enjoyment and opportunities to build connections with other students. There are also separate hostels for boys and girls, which provide breakfast, lunch, and dinner for hostel students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with okay teachers, average hostel, and awesome canteen food.

review_content.Placements: My friends in their 4th year just got their placements this year, and I can say they receive about 5-9 Lacs per annum. My college claims to provide placements ranging from 4-12 Lacs per annum. Top recruiters include L&T, Tops Technology, and electrical companies. About 60% of students are getting placements, I guess.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my department, the infrastructure is okay. The classrooms are spacious with benches and fans, but there’s no air conditioning, and in some classes, there are no smart boards. There’s a limit of 35 MB and only a basic internet speed. Labs for practical work are very modern and equipped with air conditioning. There’s a reading room, but it gets crowded during exam time, making it difficult to find a place to sit. The hostel facilities are also average. The rooms are not very big but manageable, with basic furniture: a bed, table, a chair, and a cupboard. The washrooms are average, and the Wi-Fi is slow.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members because they give the best education.

review_content.Placements: There are many students who get placement in our college to succeed in their life. In the last year of 2024, one student got a 24-lakh-per-annum package from the company work, stack developer, etc., and students are satisfied a lot, and the families are too.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities in our college that are very helpful to the students and facilities for their work and technical practice. Classrooms are clean and provide libraries also to bring the best books and also provide a reading environment. They give Wi-Fi to complete student's important work.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Let's know about my college.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students have placed in my course. The lowest package offered is 4 lakhs per annum, while the highest is 15 lakhs per annum. The course covers top technologies like L&T, many from LinkedIn, and companies like L&T, etc. It also includes web development, software engineering, cyber security, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has seven departments. Each department has four laboratories with two compartments each. Each department also has three libraries and a reading room. The quality of food in the canteen is better than any cheap restaurant. It has a sports room that includes a badminton court, table tennis, chess, carrom, and a large cricket ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Chalo Surat Chalo Pithawala college.

review_content.Placements: 50-60 percent get placed. The highest package is 13 LPA. Companies like L&T, Torrent, Byju's, and many more recruit here. Most students get internships from the college in companies around Surat. As a mechanical student, students get into production or design roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are large enough for more than 35 students to sit in a single class. The library is available in all the departments with all the course-related books. Labs are available in every department and are conducted regularly. The quality of accommodation in the hostel is good. Food quality is a minor issue. Medical facilities are available, and sports facilities are very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The placement and infrastructure are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements that are excellent are good. Nearly 30 companies visit our course. The highest package is 35 LPA, and the lowest and average package are 7.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and some others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and many facilities are provided by our college management. They provide spacious digital classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity for labs, and a library with a huge collection of books. They provide hostels and medical facilities.

faqs.question: How hard is getting admission into C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: It is a bit competitive to get into C.K. Pithawalla College of Engineering & Technology (CKPCET). Admission depends on merit, some based on GUJCET or JEE Main scores. For GUJCET 2024, the closing rank for general home state candidates varied from 19,513 to 39,081 indicated that sharply divergent scores would be needed to get through. They should also fulfill the criteria for eligibility such as holding a 10+2 with at least 45% aggregate marks in appropriate subjects. Entrance exams need to be taken very seriously and students should prepare well in advance towards their outcome to guarantee for getting admitted.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, strong practical learning, peaceful campus environment at CK Pithawala College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided include labs, classrooms, a library, a canteen, Wi-Fi, medical facilities, and sports. Various events are hosted, offering enjoyment and opportunities to build connections with other students. There are also separate hostels for boys and girls, which provide breakfast, lunch, and dinner for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with okay teachers, average hostel, and awesome canteen food.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the infrastructure is okay. The classrooms are spacious with benches and fans, but there’s no air conditioning, and in some classes, there are no smart boards. There’s a limit of 35 MB and only a basic internet speed. Labs for practical work are very modern and equipped with air conditioning. There’s a reading room, but it gets crowded during exam time, making it difficult to find a place to sit. The hostel facilities are also average. The rooms are not very big but manageable,...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members because they give the best education.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college that are very helpful to the students and facilities for their work and technical practice. Classrooms are clean and provide libraries also to bring the best books and also provide a reading environment. They give Wi-Fi to complete student's important work.

reviews.review_heading: Let's know about my college.
reviews.review_text: It has seven departments. Each department has four laboratories with two compartments each. Each department also has three libraries and a reading room. The quality of food in the canteen is better than any cheap restaurant. It has a sports room that includes a badminton court, table tennis, chess, carrom, and a large cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Chalo Surat Chalo Pithawala college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are large enough for more than 35 students to sit in a single class. The library is available in all the departments with all the course-related books. Labs are available in every department and are conducted regularly. The quality of accommodation in the hostel is good. Food quality is a minor issue. Medical facilities are available, and sports facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The placement and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, and many facilities are provided by our college management. They provide spacious digital classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity for labs, and a library with a huge collection of books. They provide hostels and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college for Computer Science.
reviews.review_text: Our college is one of the best colleges. It provides all possible facilities to its students. The college has a Wi-Fi connection throughout the entire campus. The labs of the college are properly equipped. Hostel facilities are also offered in our college. The college also has a canteen facility. The mess food is also good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Experience at C.K Pithawalla College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, and the college is making efforts to improve it. Facilities are good; classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, proper benches, and other necessary amenities. The Wi-Fi facility is kind of okay and requires improvement. The library is also nice and contains every book related to the course. There are two hostels on campus with proper facilities for the students, including eatable mess food, proper medical facilities, and no sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Now the practical skills are being taken seriously.
reviews.review_text: It's basic, just like a government college. The future college doesn't seem to be the college, as it just gets renovated when any political person or any other person is going to visit. The classroom is also just like a hawali, not very well organized for the better use of engineering.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience: College is for personality and growth in your field.
reviews.review_text: In computer department you will find modern labs, Smart classrooms with fast Wi-Fi, and a large reading room and library where you can find technical books as well as research journals. Apart from this, the hostel offers modern and comfortable accommodation, study rooms, and recreation areas.

reviews.review_heading: Study in Surat, ckpcet college .
reviews.review_text:
I am living in Surat city, so I am not living in a college hostel, but I will provide a brief description of the college hostel.
Boys' or girls' hostels are available.
Hostel fees: INR 50 thousand per year.
They have two hostels, one for boys and one for girls.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and facilities. Smart boards and modern benches are provided for students. There are large buildings, and they are close to each other. A sports area was recently developed. The hostel is brand new, with a proper mess and other amenities.

reviews.review_heading: The best review of CKPCET.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi system in our hostel. Classroom is very huge with a capacity of 80 students. Library is also available on campus but some books and journals are not available in it. All labs are available like the mechanical lab, computer lab, electrical lab, and pharmaceutical lab. The food served in the mess is average in quality. The canteen's food is excellent. Medical facilities are poor. Sports and games are the best and also sports events are established in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm completely satisfied because of the good placements and really good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The labs in our college have all the required instruments to perform practicals. The food provided in the canteen is very good. Basic medical facilities are also available in our college in case of emergency. The library has a very good accommodation capacity. More than 5,000 books are available in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: College is not that much bad. Nowadays college is improving sport areas and infrastructure all.
reviews.review_text: The college is quite good, infrastructure and all college has no issues. If you're in college then you'll surely enjoy the atmosphere. Here water tank supplies, food supplies are quite good. Wi-Fi is also available in labs for study perspective. Medical facilities are also here like first aid and so on.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about C.K Pithawalla College of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: Companies like L&T, Adani Group, Birla Group, Nokia Care, Ashok Leyland, visit the campus every year for placements.

review_content.Placements: 5 percent of students were placed and the average package was only 2 LPA with startup companies hiring. No top companies visited the college. The college had collaborated with some companies and arranged internships, but students had to pay for them, and those internships were not even worthy.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility was available, but mobile network signals were not frequent, making it hard to find a signal on campus. Classrooms were limited, but the library, which was recently constructed, was good and provided a comfortable environment. Labs were there, but the facilities were not as good as were average. Hostel facilities were available, but there were frequent water and power issues. The college had a nurse, but only for 2 to 3 hours, and the medical equipment was limited. They did not prioritize sports much.

placement_data.title: Arjun College of Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Arjun College of Technology in Coimbatore boasts a proactive placement cell dedicated to transforming its students into industry-ready professionals. According to the official website, their placement record has shown steady improvement over the years. In addition to facilitating placement opportunities, the college organizes a variety of workshops, guest lectures, and seminars aimed at the comprehensive development of its students. Furthermore, students have access to numerous value-added programs, as well as training in soft skills and aptitude.

The placement drive for the 2024 season at Arjun College of Technology has ended, but the placement report is still pending. In contrast, the 2025 NIRF report has been published. A total of 100 BTech students achieved placements during Arjun College of Technology placements. The median package recorded was INR 6 LPA .

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for RVS College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: RVS College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, RVS College of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MCA. RVS College of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    RVS College of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at RVS College of Engineering and Technology are Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Petroleum Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do RVS College of Engineering and Technology offer in their courses?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, but it should be improved.

review_content.Placements: Above 60% of the students from our course got placed. The average salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 12,500 per month. A top company visited our campus for placements is Amazon. I don't know about the roles offered to the students. The salary package offered can vary depending on the type of job. The percentage may be not accurate, but most of the students got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, etc., are available for the students. The hostel should be maintained in a bit high quality because in the summer season it is too hot. A number of fans available in the hostel rooms are less, and some were not working properly. Food served can be tolerable compared to others, and it is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good in placements and atmosphere of our college is good to learn and grow.

review_content.Placements: Around 45% of the students from our course get placed. Because of backlogs, some students are not able to get placed. The salary package offered ranges from Rs. 10,000 per month to Rs. 45,000 per month. Aspire System's, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc., are the top recruiting companies. Especially software developer and trainee position are offered to students. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA. We get 40% of internships from the companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are the best in our college for our course. There are 3 IBM powered labs. There are comfortable and spacious classrooms. Wi-Fi is available 24x7. The library is always open. The hostel food is in good quality and both veg, and non-veg is provided. There are canteens available near our block.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is best to study here.

content.Placements: Not really satisfied with my college placements, maybe in future placements will be better or improved. Right now highest package salary is 10 LPA to 20 LPA. Me and my friends are not satisfied, and the last one is the course details. Me and my friends are not satisfied with placement classes, its just for a basic only.
content.Infrastructure: There is not much hygiene and taste at my college hostel like other hostels. It is not worth for money also. Especially, there are only two canteens and one tea shop all are handled by one contractor. Canteen food is also not much good as we need to improve hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college management.

content.Placements: No students got placed in the batch of 2016. They made an arrangements for few BPO companies which have visited the college. Management charges some amount for placement cell which doesn't even exit in the campus. Some of my seniors got placed and in my batch as well attending job fairs which was conducted by the companies!
content.Infrastructure: There are lot of facilities available in the campus but no use of it due to lack of proper usage. Classrooms and labs are big and clean but the instruments are old. They rented the apartment community for ladies hostel which is outside the college. The maintenance team is really worse.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average college, infrastructure, and placements. Staff is good.

review_content.Placements: I am in the CSE department, and I took admission in 2023, and my passing batch is 2027. My class strength is 60; however, it increases from 2nd year as more students accept admission. Companies do visit colleges for placement, but in the CSE branch, however, very few companies come for the CSE branch. Most students get internships through referral.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in colleges as well as hostels. There are computer labs and workshops present in the college. The speed of Wi-Fi is also good. There is only one hostel for boys and one for girls. All rooms are four people sharing. The quality of mess food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Better than some private colleges. You can definitely visit this college once.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average at the college, with 50-60% of students placed. The main recruiter is LIC, and companies like Accenture, Wipro, and TCS also visit the college. However, the package for the Mechanical branch is higher than for the Computer Science and Engineering branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, so the infrastructure is good. It opened in 2017. The washrooms are neat and clean, and the hostel is also well-maintained. The food in the hostel is average. Sports meetups are held at the college, and all sports facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: Ch. Ranbir Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement statistics for the Civil Engineering 2024 batch are around 30 to 40% placement. Package details. The highest package is 6 LPA, the minimum package is 2.4 LPA, and the average package is 3.5 LPA. No top-rated companies came to our college, though some students cracked government exams. The top roles offered are Site Engineer and Project Coordinator.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi is available across the campus, including classrooms, the library, and hostel areas. However, the speed can vary during peak usage times. The civil engineering department is equipped with well-maintained labs, such as the surveying lab, concrete lab, and highway materials.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college for reputed B.Tech in budget.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are decent, with around 50% of students getting placed. The highest package offered in 2020 was 7.2 LPA. Top recruiters include Mitsuba India Pvt Ltd and Nagata Auto Engineering India Pvt Ltd. Internships are not that great, and you will need to find one yourself.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for mechanical engineering is not so good, and the labs could be improved. The teachers are quite good, knowledgeable, and have doctorates. Hostel life is okay, but the mess food is not so good. Medical support is lacking, and sports facilities are not adequate.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average college, infrastructure, and placements. Staff is good.

content.Placements: I am in the CSE department, and I took admission in 2023, and my passing batch is 2027. My class strength is 60; however, it increases from 2nd year as more students accept admission. Companies do visit colleges for placement, but in the CSE branch, however, very few companies come for the CSE branch. Most students get internships through referral.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in colleges as well as hostels. There are computer labs and workshops present in the college. The speed of Wi-Fi is also good. There is only one hostel for boys and one for girls. All rooms are four people sharing. The quality of mess food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Better than some private colleges. You can definitely visit this college once.

content.Placements: Placements are average at the college, with 50-60% of students placed. The main recruiter is LIC, and companies like Accenture, Wipro, and TCS also visit the college. However, the package for the Mechanical branch is higher than for the Computer Science and Engineering branch.
content.Infrastructure: The college is newly built, so the infrastructure is good. It opened in 2017. The washrooms are neat and clean, and the hostel is also well-maintained. The food in the hostel is average. Sports meetups are held at the college, and all sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It’s a very great college you can definitely consider.

content.Placements: Placement of the college is average. About 60% of students are placed in companies. The mass recruiter is LIC, and companies like Accenture, Wipro, and TCS visit during the placement session. However, the placement of the mechanical branch is better than that of CSE, with the highest package being 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good since it opened in 2017. The washrooms are neat and clean. There are water coolers, but sometimes they don’t provide cold water, and it can be frustrating.
content.Faculty: The faculty is good. Teachers are nice and supportive, with proper knowledge of their subjects. Labs are also managed by professors, and there are proper AC labs available in the college. Semester exams are easy; if you study well, you can easily clear them.

Ranbir Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

Ch. Ranbir Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 410511 and 1386929 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. reviews.review_heading: My college, CRSSIET, is one of the good technical colleges in Jhajjar.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of game facilities in college, like cricket, table tennis, etc. Many tournaments are done in our college for all students, and there is also a good scope for games like cricket. There are too many labs in our college for students to sit in.

reviews.review_heading: Average as this college is newly constructed and takes times to improve.
reviews.review_text:
1. Wi-Fi is available on every side of the campus, even in the hostels for boys and girls.
2. This college has bigger classrooms, and Wi-Fi-covered computer labs are there. They have Chemistry labs, workshops, BME lab, every floor side for every department. Cabins for every department staff.
3. The library is covered with Wi-Fi and books, including every core-related book, even business, spiritual, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Leading institute for quality education: excellence in academic and career development.
reviews.review_text: The pretty decent infrastructure of the college is spread over 40 acres of land. It has an administrative block and one good campus building and the hostel facilities are also very adequate. The food is also good and the hygienic atmosphere at the hostel would definitely recommend it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ch. Ranbir Singh State Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Surroundings are good. Our college is under construction. Hostels are well-equipped and maintained. The food served in the mess is good. Our college is in a village area.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college and staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good of our college, it has hostel, mess and canteen in our college. All labs are available like workshop technology lab, chemistry lab, physics lab and computer lab. Medical facilities are also active and sports section is also improving.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has state-of-the-art facilities for our course. The hostel is well-maintained and clean with comfortable rooms and basic amenities. The hostel staff members are friendly and helpful and ensure to have a safe environment for girls.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: Our college was established in 2017. It is affiliated with Maharishi Dayanand University, Haryana. The infrastructure of our college is good. Computer labs and labs for other departments are improving. Hostel is separate for boys and girls. Food quality is good. Hostel fee is Rs.6,000 per semester and the mess fee is Rs.3,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: CRSSIET - A college to give wings to your dreams.
reviews.review_text: We have good accommodation. Hostels are fully wi-fi working and cctv cameras are installed everywhere. Classrooms are good so that each n every student can SEE and listen to what the teacher is saying. We have well functioned library with all needed books.

college_info.college_name: Sardar Patel University, Balaghat: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Situated in Balaghat city, Madhya Pradesh, Sardar Patel University was founded in year 2018 as a private college. A leading institute in the city offers 72 courses of Degree. Sardar Patel University, Balaghat is a well-known institution for UG, PG and After 10th courses, These programs delivered by a highly experienced faculty. Candidate can pursue in multiple range of courses like B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc., M.Sc., B.A., M.A., B.Com, M.Com, BCA, MCA, B.Ed, M.Ed, BFA, MFA, BBA, B.J.M.C., M.J.M.C., B.Lib.Sc., M.Lib.Sc., M.E./M.Tech, BSW, MSW, After 10th Diploma, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, D.Pharma, M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.El.Ed with the stream of Engineering, Science, Humanities & Social Sciences, Teaching & Education, Accounting & Commerce, IT & Software, Design, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Hospitality & Travel, Mass Communication & Media, Business & Management Studies, Beauty & Fitness, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute give offer to students to gain proficiency & expertise in the specialization of Food Technology. Most importantly, these courses with 664 seats are imparted at affordable fees with range of INR 11,000-261,500, which increase accessibility and allow students the opportunity to gain knowledge and skills in their chosen field.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sardar Patel University, Balaghat offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Sardar Patel University, Balaghat offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fees for Sardar Patel University, Balaghat courses range between INR 11,000 to 2,61,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is large and beautiful. Faculty is also nice.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students in our B.Sc. batch in biology and chemistry. There can be various types of packages offered in my course; the lowest can be around INR 10 thousand per month, and the highest can be around INR 1 lac to 1.5 lac per month. Companies like Tata, etc., visit for recruitment. Around 60% of students had internships at Tata, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities that we get are good, and the infrastructure is really amazing. The campus is also big; there are labs with almost every piece of equipment, and a library is also available from time to time with every book needed for the study. The problem is the mess; the food quality is the main problem. The quality of food goes up and down from time to time. Medical facilities are great. Sports are also being played, and they are held from time to time, as in summer vacation, with many games such as cricket, basketball, kabaddi, kho-kho, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: B.Sc. is not for placements. I'm satisfied with college.

review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality was good but not all the teachers. The course curriculum is relevant. The level of semester exams was medium.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: How is the scope of microbiology?
overview_faqs.answer: The scope of microbiology is huge because of the involvement of microbiology in various fields such as Pharmacy, Medicine, clinical research, agriculture, dairy industry, water industry, nanotechnology & chemical technology. A person who specialises in this field is called a Microbiologist. Some of the Jobs in this field are mentioned below -1. Biomedical scientist2. Bio technologist3. Clinical research associate4. Food technologist5. Healthcare scientist, immunology6. Medicinal chemist7. Microbiologist8. Nano technologist.

review_summary.college_name: Sardar Patel University, Balaghat Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is good you can take admission in this college, for budget friendly studies.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in my course. 5 LPA is the highest package, 2 LPA is average package, and 1 LPA is the lowest package. TCS and Wipro types of companies recruiting for my course. 20% of students got internships from my course at Wipro. Civil engineer role is offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: All types of facilities and infrastructure are good enough in my course like Wi-Fi. Labs are available. Hostel is not available in my college but you can take PG or rented room near this college. Buses and transport are not available, you can use your own transport source to reach the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Education (B.Ed.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied and value of money.

content.Placements: Top recruiters are IBM, Persistent, Wipro, Emphasis, Hettich, Infosys. Based on the performance of students in the written test, GD round, and interview, they will be offered placements in different companies with varying salary packages. The average package was around 5 to 8 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Provides separate hostels for boys and girls. All the hostel rooms are provided with basic furniture and facilities. Mess facilities are also available for hostellers, which serves good quality and hygienic food at a cheap price. It's around 3000/month. The college also has a canteen facility for staff and students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus is large and beautiful. Faculty is also nice.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in our B.Sc. batch in biology and chemistry. There can be various types of packages offered in my course; the lowest can be around INR 10 thousand per month, and the highest can be around INR 1 lac to 1.5 lac per month. Companies like Tata, etc., visit for recruitment. Around 60% of students had internships at Tata, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that we get are good, and the infrastructure is really amazing. The campus is also big; there are labs with almost every piece of equipment, and a library is also available from time to time with every book needed for the study. The problem is the mess; the food quality is the main problem. The quality of food goes up and down from time to time. Medical facilities are great. Sports are also being played, and they are held from time to time, as in summer vacation, with many games such as cricket, basketball, kabaddi, kho-kho, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good with good faculty members.

content.Placements: B.Sc. is not for placements. I'm satisfied with college.
content.Infrastructure: College has a good infrastructure. Campus is very good and away from the noise with a calm environment. Library is enough for students. Labs are good. Classrooms are very good and very comfortable. Other things are above-average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality was good but not all the teachers. The course curriculum is relevant. The level of semester exams was medium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members.

content.Placements: There are around 60 students in the B. Pharma course. It is an excellent course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month & the average salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Dabur, Zydus, Baidhnath, Cipla, Mankind, etc., are the companies recruiting from our college. Around 6% of the students got internships from our course from Cipla, Dabur, Mankind. Top roles offered are courses like biotechnology senior research scientist, research scientist. Pharmaceutical field sales representative, and pharmaceutical functional analyst.

reviews.review_heading: College is good you can take admission in this college, for budget friendly studies.
reviews.review_text: All types of facilities and infrastructure are good enough in my course like Wi-Fi. Labs are available. Hostel is not available in my college but you can take PG or rented room near this college. Buses and transport are not available, you can use your own transport source to reach the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and value of money.
reviews.review_text: Provides separate hostels for boys and girls. All the hostel rooms are provided with basic furniture and facilities. Mess facilities are also available for hostellers, which serves good quality and hygienic food at a cheap price. It's around 3000/month. The college also has a canteen facility for staff and students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is large and beautiful. Faculty is also nice.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that we get are good, and the infrastructure is really amazing. The campus is also big; there are labs with almost every piece of equipment, and a library is also available from time to time with every book needed for the study. The problem is the mess; the food quality is the main problem. The quality of food goes up and down from time to time. Medical facilities are great. Sports are also being played, and they are held from time to time, as in summer vacation, with many games s...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College has a good infrastructure. Campus is very good and away from the noise with a calm environment. Library is enough for students. Labs are good. Classrooms are very good and very comfortable. Other things are above-average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with college facilities, low placement in 2023, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good than most of the college in surrounding area. There are many green areas on the campus, and many trees. But the building in which the students study is quite small. I will not say anything about the open area, there is sufficient space.

review_summary.college_name: Amritsar Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Is ACET value for money?

content.Placements: There are 22 students in our batch among which 2 of us got placed in a local company. The average package is about 3.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Khanna Paper Mill, Luminous, Ericsson, etc. We are offered engineer role in the company we got selected.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel building is quite new and semi-furnished. Maximum room capacity is 4. Wi-Fi is available for each two rooms and is quite slow. The food is vegetarian and no non-vegetarian food is available in the hostel. Cricket and football tournaments are organized every semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed. The highest package is 6.5 LPA. The lowest salary is 3.5 LPA. Recruiting company is Supple Tek. 70.75% of students got internships. There are many roles like you can be a teacher after completing M.Sc. Many students got placements in Supple Tek. Many students get higher and lower positions according to their eligibility basis. There are many courses available in the college. Many students got paced in many industries like fertilizer industry like Supple Tek company which exports the price in one country to another. You can take admission there if you want. Many students get placements from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Right place for a bright career.

content.Placements: According to College Deep, the placement of students is one hundred percent, but according to me, only 16% of students got placed in good company. The highest package is 46 Lacs. Whereas the average package is 3 to 4 Lacs in the course. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Sectra, and there was fewer opportunities for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is there, labs are there, classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and there is a library. The canteen is also good. The food in the hostel is average, and the facilities are good. Various sports and games are held regularly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college to study and enjoy colldge life fully.

content.Placements: Placement rate is high and packages are good. There were many recruiters including Bajaj Finance, Amazon and Flipkart. Many of my friends got a chance for internships and are fully satisfied.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were nice and tidy, there were many labs, an e-classroom specifically for some remote class from the teacher that were teaching in the college remotely through webniars etc. Library had the most good environment, we always got together here to complete our notes.
content.Faculty: Teachers were good and helping, curriculum was more theory and was simple and straightforward, the exams were not that difficult and retests were conducted so everybody passes the exam, the teaching quality was average, teachers wanted students to ask questions .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A college with good facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placements. The highest salary package offered is 42 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Wipro, TCS, and many more. There are several roles offered as per companies' requirements and students skills. Training and internships are also provided.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi, all kinds of labs, E-classrooms, a library with wide collections of books, a seminar hall, an auditorium, a canteen, and many more. The hostel has great infrastructure and provides healthy food. Many tournaments are held in the hostel.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amritsar Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
AGC has a home away from home for those students who come from various other countries, states and city outskirts providing them the best amenities to make them feel at home. The students develop a sense of responsibility and learn to manage their life independently staying in hostels. They also develop qualities such as solidarity and comradeship having gained rich experience living in the hostels. AGC is currently having two boys’ hostels (International Hostel and Sardar Patel Boys' Hostel) and one girls’ hostel (Kalpana Chawla Girls’ hostel).

Salient features of AGC Hostels

• Fully furnished and spacious ventilated rooms accommodating single/two/three/four students in each room.
• Separate residential facility for boys and girls within the campus.
• Air-conditioned and standard rooms (equipped with desert Air-coolers) available in boys and girls hostels.
• Well-furnished dining rooms accommodating more than 400 students at a time.
• Hygienic food made under the strict supervision of hostel authorities.
• RO mineral water facility round the clock.
• Hot water available in winter season.
• 24/7 power availability.
• Study room, TV room, Cafeteria, Gymnasium facility available.
• Outdoor and indoor games facility.
• Wi-Fi facility available round the clock.
• Fully secured and comfortable housing facility to all the inmates.
• Ragging – free environment.
• Personal care and regular counseling.
• First-aid facility.
• Health care and regular visits of registered physicians in the hostels.
• Bus facility available for hostel students.

library.description:
The Central Library of Amritsar Group of Colleges, since its commencement in May 2002, in AGC’s Amritsar College of Engineering & Technology (ACET) campus; has been on the road of development on a daily basis. The library houses in 625 sq. ft. area of the College campus and consists of an adequately rich collection of books and works of literature, rich with the collection of over 67,500 books.
In addition, a digital library is the part of the main central library and has access to 22 computers and more than 400 non-printed materials for the fulfillment of the requirement of the students. Highlights of the library in the Amritsar Group of Colleges’ ACET campus: Centrally Air Conditioned, Reading room, Competitive Exam Section, Wi-Fi Facility, Digital Library. E-Journals (IEEE Access and 195 from DELNET) and Reprographic Facility.

The library has a seating capacity of about 100 students at a time. It also has a separate reading hall. Moreover, the library includes various sections such as periodical section- subscribing more than 15 National and International journals in print foam and 200 E-Journals (National and International) by DELNET; and in the circulation section we are continuously available from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM for the issue and return of the books.
Library follows the “Browne charging system” for the circulation, where in 3 tickets are issued to each student and all the college employees are entitled to get 4 books issued.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Play Ground, Volley Ball Court

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Is ACET value for money?
reviews.review_text: Hostel building is quite new and semi-furnished. Maximum room capacity is 4. Wi-Fi is available for each two rooms and is quite slow. The food is vegetarian and no non-vegetarian food is available in the hostel. Cricket and football tournaments are organized every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are well-managed. Infrastructure is also good. Fresh food and medical facilities are well. There are canteen and mess on the campus. A playground is also available on the campus. Fast food is also available in the canteen and many varieties of food are available.

reviews.review_heading: Right place for a bright career.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is there, labs are there, classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and there is a library. The canteen is also good. The food in the hostel is average, and the facilities are good. Various sports and games are held regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study and enjoy colldge life fully.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were nice and tidy, there were many labs, an e-classroom specifically for some remote class from the teacher that were teaching in the college remotely through webniars etc. Library had the most good environment, we always got together here to complete our notes.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college like Wi-Fi, all kinds of labs, E-classrooms, a library with wide collections of books, a seminar hall, an auditorium, a canteen, and many more. The hostel has great infrastructure and provides healthy food. Many tournaments are held in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amritsar Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library for its courses. Hostel facilities generally include Wi-Fi, basic accommodation, and a secure environment, with messes serving a variety of hygienic meals. Sports, medical facilities, etc., are there.

reviews.review_heading: Encouraging in extracurricular.
reviews.review_text: The labs , library, classrooms and other infrastructure are still in good  but the campus is not that much big . So the college's infrastructure is good , but in the case of hostels , mess can be a problem but not at all, as the food provided is edible as compared to other hostels or PGs around the area.

reviews.review_heading: It's an autonomous college with NAAC grade A.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and many computer labs are available for students. Library facilities are also available, and a decent quantity of books are available for students. The mess food quality is very average, and three meals are provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is an autonomous college with NBA accreditation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty decent. There are many computer labs available for BCA and CSE students. Hostel facilities are also available, and the quality of food is average, like in every college. Sports facilities are also available, and the college organizes tournaments every year for cricket, football, badminton, and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is very supportive and qualified. Not so good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is good, and the infrastructure is also good. The hostel is good but too small, with only a single mess for two wings. It also does not offer many indoor or outdoor games or activities on a regular basis. Classrooms do not offer Wi-Fi. The campus has a library and labs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 5 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best decision of my life was getting admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good, and the infrastructure of the college was well-constructed. Rooms, labs, and library were also well-established. Wi-Fi speed was good for download and upload. Hostel facilities were also available. The food quality of the hostel and canteen was tasty and healthy. The sports ground was also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Amritsar College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 3 Mar 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College had top quality faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure for the CSE course. Our course department has a separate building in which all the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, classrooms, projectors, etc., are offered. The college also has its own hostel for the college students, which is located near to the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amritsar Group of Colleges.

faqs.answer: The West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences (WBUAFS) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to different programs:For the B.V.Sc. & A.H. program, the candidate must qualify and obtain a rank in the NEET-UG conducted by NTA.For the B.F.Sc. program, the selection of students for admission will be done as per a merit list without any entrance examination. The merit list will be prepared according to the percentage of total marks obtained in the subjects of H.S. or its equivalent examinations.For the B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) program, the mode of admission is through counseling of the eligible candidates from the merit list of WBUAFS/WBJEEB ranks (wherever applicable).For the M.Tech. and other postgraduate programs, the university conducts written test examinations and personal interviews for final selection
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences for admission?

faqs.answer: Yes, the West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences accepts the WBJEE score for admission to its BTech courses. The admission criteria for Bachelor of Fishery Sciences (B.F.Sc) include qualifying in the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination for Engineering/Technology (WBJEE) conducted by WBJEEB, passing Higher Secondary (10+2) Examination of the West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education or its equivalent examination in Science stream from any recognised Board/Council from any institution, and being a citizen of India, not less than 17 years as on 31st December in the year of application, and a domicile of West Bengal.
faqs.question: Q: Does West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences accept JEE score?

faqs.answer: The West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences offers courses in veterinary and animal sciences, dairy sciences, and fishery sciences. The top courses offered by the university are Bachelor of Veterinary Science (BVSC) and Animal Husbandry (AH), Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.), and Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.). Admission to most of the undergraduate courses is done on the basis of the WBJEE entrance examination, while eligibility for postgraduate and Ph.D. courses requires graduation and postgraduation in a relevant field.

overview_faqs.question: Is West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences good for M.Tech?
overview_faqs.answer: West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences offers M.Tech courses in Dairy Technology and Fishery Sciences. The university has been recognised as one of the leading institutions in the country to uplift the socio-economical status of farmers and has been engaged in improving research infrastructure to develop cutting-edge technologies for improved management of animal and fishery resources, disease problems, nutrients, water resources, and the environment. The university has three faculties, namely Faculty of Veterinary & Animal Sciences, Faculty of Dairy Technology, and Faculty of Fishery Sciences. Therefore, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences can be considered a good option for pursuing M.Tech in Dairy Technology and Fishery Sciences.

admission_process.title: West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Established in 1995 to impart education, training and research in the field of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, Dairy Sciences and Fishery Sciences, especially in the rural areas of West Bengal. The University has three faculties and 31 departments that collectively offer eight UGC-approved courses at UG, PG and doctoral level.

WBUAFS admissions are conducted in online mode through its official website. Admission to some of the programmes offered at the University is entrance-based while for remaining courses, admission is based on merit of previous qualifying degree/ exam. Given below are the entrance exams accepted by WBUAFS:
UG courses:
PG courses:
PhD course:
lists: Admission to BVSc & AH programme is based onNEET UGscore obtained by eligible candidates
Candidates willing to seek BTech admission are evaluated based on West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) score, followed by a university-level Personal Interview (PI) round
WBUAFS BFSc admission is based on performance of a candidate in previous qualifying degree/ exam
For granting admission to PG programmes, including MVSc, MFSc and MTech, the University conducts an admission test followed by a PI round
Admission of candidates to WBUAFS PhD programme is based on aggregate obtained by eligible candidates in their relevant previous master's degree

The admission criteria for Bachelor of Fishery Sciences (B.F.Sc) include qualifying in the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination for Engineering/Technology (WBJEE) conducted by WBJEEB, passing Higher Secondary (10+2) Examination of the West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education or its equivalent examination in Science stream from any recognised Board/Council from any institution, and being a citizen of India, not less than 17 years as on 31st December in the year of application, and a domicile of West Bengal.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) programme at the West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences (WBUAFS) is 44 seats. The reservations of seats for this programme are as follows:SC-22%, ST-6%, OBC-A-10%, OBC-B-7%, ICAR Nominee-15%, Person with Disability (PwD)-5%*GTA- 01* seat in each course.GTA & PwD seat @ 5% (i.e., 02) will be on a horizontal basis.The selected candidates will be placed in the appropriate category, i.e., General, SC, ST, OBC-A, and OBC-B, to which they belong.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences for admission?
faqs.answer: The West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences (WBUAFS) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission to different programs:For the B.V.Sc. & A.H. program, the candidate must qualify and obtain a rank in the NEET-UG conducted by NTA.For the B.F.Sc. program, the selection of students for admission will be done as per a merit list without any entrance examination. The merit list will be prepared according to the percentage of total marks obtained in the subjects of H.S. or its equivalent examinations.For the B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) program, the mode of admission is through counseling of the eligible candidates from the merit list of WBUAFS/WBJEEB ranks (wherever applicable).For the M.Tech. and other postgraduate programs, the university conducts written test examinations and personal interviews for final selection

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for M.Tech at West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for M.Tech at West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences requires the candidate to have a minimum of 6.2 Overall Grade Point Average (O.G.P.A.) for general category & 6.0 for SC, ST, OBC-A & OBC-B, PwD categories in 10 point scale in their B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.Tech. (D.T.) & B.F.Sc. courses.

faqs.question: Does West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery Sciences offer better placements than Sister Nivedita University?
faqs.answer: West Bengal University of animal and fishery sciences has placement rate of 100% and the top recruiters are Nestle, Amul, Mother Dairy. Around 100% of students get placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is above 5 LPA and the lowest salary is Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Amul, GCMMF, Mother Dairy, Keventer, Parle, etc. About sister Nivedita - The placement in B.Tech is 90% with an average package being between 4-6LPA with the top recruiting companies being TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, IBM, Accenture, HCL Technologies, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Dell, and HP. reviews.review_heading: It is the best veterinary university in India.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and good infrastructure are available in the course. There are different facilities and a good environment. Labs and classrooms are good. The hostel staff members and facilities are also good. Library facilities are okay, and every student gets benefits.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the BVSC and AH course.
reviews.review_text: Here, there are good facilities for Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library. The campus is clean and pollution-free. Hostels are good, and the food also for good and healthy. Sports and medical facilities are also provided, and the mess and canteen with very low prices of foods are available.

reviews.review_heading: Healthy and happily growing university.
reviews.review_text:
We have lucrative facilities and infrastructure available for our course and department. We have Wi-Fi, laboratory, classroom and library facilities. In the laboratory, we can use equipment and machines for improving or practical knowledge. From the library, we can issue books, magazines and research papers according to our needs and keep them for 2 to 3 months interchangeably.
The quality of the hostel rooms and the food available in the maze and canteen are very good. The medical facility is a...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college environment.
reviews.review_text: 20 department are present throughout the BVSC and AH course all are well-equipped with outstanding Professors and technician assisting them. Classrooms are well furnished with smartboards and blackboards with air conditioned. Several buildings for different departments and years present. Wi-Fi present with good stability. Labs are heavily Equipped with instruments and every requirements. Central Library funded by ICAR with huge collection of books of foreign and Indian authors are very resourcef...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 7 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best and the cheapest in the field of fisheries.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is not so big but very well organized. We have smart classrooms and up-to-date chemical labs are there as well. Our library has thousands of books and some of them are very rare to get. Hostels are spacious and airy. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. For sports, we have a big playground, a tennis court, and a volleyball court. For medical facilities, we have a doctor's chamber on campus as well.

reviews.review_heading: Best course for animal lovers.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good. Very clean and ambient environment. Projectors and other modern facilities are available. Laboratories are also there in every department. Maximun equipment is available. Regular practical classes were also conducted. A library facility is available inside the campus. Students can study there and blend books. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The girls hostel rooms are very good. Sufficient light and fans are there. Rooms are quite big and clean, ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 27 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best in the field of fisheries.
reviews.review_text: As our course is authorized by ICAR, it has a broad scope worldwide. The 4-year bachelor's course will give you a brief knowledge of fisheries. And the hostels are in very good condition with proper security. And there is a good bond between seniors and juniors.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure provided by the university were good. Smart classes are available for better understanding. Well-equipped labs are there.
Central library, from which you may procure books for a considerable period of time. You may study there as long as you can in a pindrop-silent environment.
Hostel facilities are better; all the instruments for study are there and the necessities for storming are there. Foods are tasty and good.
For medical facilities, there is a medical unit...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 16 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and feel proud to say I'm a student at the Faculty of Fisheries Sciences, WBUAFS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the faculty is outstanding. Because this is only one fishery campus in West Bengal, the lab infrastructure, Wi-Fi facility, classroom, hatchery management, wet lab, hostel facility, and canteen are all excellent. A medical facility is also there, and an indoor hospital is also available. Hygiene, healthy and good quality are being provided. Indoor and outdoor game facilities are available. Moreover, tournaments and annual sports are also held every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 16 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: So one line for fishery - Grow fish and grow with the fish.
reviews.review_text:
1. All departments provide a free Wi-Fi system, and all departments have two 3 labs for doing practical work; classrooms have AC and a projector for seminar purposes; and our library contains a variety of books and journals that provide data all over the world.
2. The hostel is very good and the foods that are provided are like those of our home; they are perfectly made. For medical facilities, there is always a doctor in the faculty, and the students of our faculty are really good at football, ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 11 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: A table of fishery Sciences by Ankush .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi only in library and departments, classrooms are average, projector, AC are there. Library is full of essential books. Labs are not well, various instruments, equipments are missing. Food is good, mostly tasty food, canteen is not there, food is provided in students mess 2 times. Medical doctors both homoeopathy and allopathy is there. Sports and games are good but needs improvement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 11 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in West Bengal for fisheries.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available. The food provided by the mess is very good and at a very low price. And no extra charges are applied for hostel rent and that is the minimum that is included with the semester. Most students get into the hostel and experience a very new and good environment. There are also facilities for indoor and outdoor gaming.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 11 Nov 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Fishery Faculty at a glance.
reviews.review_text: There are three hostels in the faculty. One for girls and the others are for boys. There are seperate classrooms for each batch. The library contains vast number of books and free Wi-Fi. There is a mess in the faculty in which students can take their meals in afternoon and night. A playground is there for sports activities. Medical facility is also available during office hours.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a very good course; the campus can be improved; no issues with placement.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is good. But the hostel is not so good. The authority is very reluctant for any hostel-related problem. Any problem takes so much time to solve. Very pathetic. Food is available in the mess. One canteen is also there. Medical facilities are available like doctor, ambulance, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Faculty of Fishery Science, West Bengal University of Animal and Fishery SciencesReviewed on 23 Oct 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our College is the Best in the Field of Fisheries.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned and having good build-up planning. There is no smart board but projectors are available in all of the classroom. Labs of all depts are very good and fully equipped. Hostel and mess is the best part. The cheapest in the total state. Only 300 rs/month is the hostel rent. The food quality of the mess is outstanding.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Anand Engineering College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Anand Engineering College offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Anand Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,28,000 to 5,96,250.

faqs.answer: A:    Anand Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBCACandidates must have passed10+2 from a recognised board or university with Mathematics and the marks mentioned above.BBACandidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognised board or university with marks mentioned above.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma in Engg. or B.Sc. with maths in 60% marks from a recognised university.MBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed 10+2 with the marks mentioned above from a recognised board.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed B.Tech from AICTE-approved institution (relaxation sponsored candidates) in related domain with the marks mentioned above.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Anand Engineering College for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Anand Engineering College are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Anand Engineering College goes up to 549.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is the best engineering college in Agra.

content.Placements: Our college provided excellent placements. Almost 70% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It was a very good college in terms of infrastructure and design. All facilities were provided in this college. Mess, canteen, medical facilities, etc., were available in this college. The food served in the mess was good. Sports were also conducted in this college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were excellent. They were helpful, knowledgeable, and highly qualified. Semester exams are conducted every six months. Most of the students passed the exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good placements.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placed in our college. During covid, students managed to get placed with good salary packages and are currently working. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, the average salary package is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 2.15 LPA. The recruiting companies are Deloitte, Netsmart, Cardekho, etc. Around 70% of students get internships in our college. The roles offered are developers and assitants.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good with good facilities but the food is not up to the mark. Library has a wide range of books. Hostel provides Wi-Fi and security. It is well maintained with hygiene. It has a well-equipped gym for students and a stadium.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and everything is perfect. The college has a library for study, and labs are perfectly arranged according to students. Classrooms are well maintained and clean. There are indoor games and a stadium.

content.Infrastructure: The college provides an excellent infrastructure and departments provide all equipment such as Systems, projectors, labs, curricular activities, and competitions to enhance the student quality. One more benefit of our college campus has a well-constructed sports stadium and club.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and the study in this college are very good.

content.Placements: The top roles offered are stack developer, android developer, TCS consultant, and many more. Some students got selected by Wipro Technologies.
