reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Agra.
reviews.review_text: It was a very good college in terms of infrastructure and design. All facilities were provided in this college. Mess, canteen, medical facilities, etc., were available in this college. The food served in the mess was good. Sports were also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good with good facilities but the food is not up to the mark. Library has a wide range of books. Hostel provides Wi-Fi and security. It is well maintained with hygiene. It has a well-equipped gym for students and a stadium.

reviews.review_heading: It is good in terms of infrastructure and education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and everything is perfect. The college has a library for study, and labs are perfectly arranged according to students. Classrooms are well maintained and clean. There are indoor games and a stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine and suggested to the student to take admitted.
reviews.review_text: The college provides an excellent infrastructure and departments provide all equipment such as Systems, projectors, labs, curricular activities, and competitions to enhance the student quality. One more benefit of our college campus has a well-constructed sports stadium and club.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the study in this college are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure. The central library of the college is situated beside the BCA department at the same floor. There is a huge stadium situated where you can play any outdoor and indoor games. An activity center is also available and you can choose what you want freely.

reviews.review_heading: Studies and classes were regular if students are interested.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and Infrastructure were Good in our college. Clean and Healthy Environment. Labs, Internet connection, and AC were provided to us anytime we want to do Lab. The library and Classrooms were also good everything a student needed was available there. But in Summers students face heat and warmth because there was only a fan available in classrooms. Hostel facilities were good I don't live in a hostel But I had lunch 2-3 times the food is good. All the facilities medical, canteen games wer...

reviews.review_heading: No, it is not good at all in studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not so good, and there are not working properly, and equipment and instruments are not there in the labs because of that we are facing a problem regarding practical knowledge or laboratory knowledge machines. Many types of equipment are too old to use.

reviews.review_heading: The placements in our college were average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. Sports facilities need to be improved. Wi-Fi is poor, and we never used it in our entire college life. They provide nothing in the name of sports kits. The college is not even providing funds for sports activities. We had to buy our own kits even when we were playing zonal matches.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of good faculty, good in infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good but there is no Wi-Fi. The classrooms are very good and our practical labs are advanced and in our library. There are so many books and our professors have good knowledge. The auditorium is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good sports.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all types of facilities like Wi-Fi, a library and labs. Hostels are pretty good, and the quality of the mess food is not good as usual. All types of medical facilities are available in the hostel, and for sports, there is a huge indoor and outdoor stadium.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very bad college because of faculty members, which is the main pillar of the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the hostel are average. Food quality is decreasing day by day. Sports are the only thing which is good in the college. Medical facilities are the worst. Infrastructure is good, but it is useless if teachers are not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good freedom. All faculty members are good and help students at every moment.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers many courses in our college like B.Tech, B. Pharmacy, B.Ed, BCA and BBA. There are 5 departments, and all departments have a separate building. B.Tech engineering building has all labs, many classrooms and a huge library. A mess serves new dishes every day, and the taste of the food is good. The canteen is huge, and many times students spend time at the canteen. The canteen serves fast food. The stationery is available. There is a huge ground, and so many games are available i...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good campus which provides good teaching, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was fine in terms of facilities provided in classrooms. There was one library in our college and classrooms were good. The food served was not good. The hostel rooms were fine. Even we had a canteen on campus. No medical facilities were provided in the college. The college organises district level cricket tournament every year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with nice teaching and fair opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms are well developed, and the projector system is also provided in them. There is also a library in our college, and the Wi-Fi facility is used by the management. Rooms of the hostel are also good. The food facility in the hostel is fine. There is one canteen in our college. In the sports area, cricket tournaments are organised in our college every year.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with placement record with average teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is average. Mostly the labs and classrooms are not highly developed. No wi-fi facility for students, it is only for faculty use. Only 1 canteen is available in college campus. The quality of food available in mess is not good. No first aid facility is available in college. In case of sports area, the college organizes cricket tournament each year in which various students from the region comes to participate.

admission_overview.college_name: HRIT Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: HRIT University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: HRIT University admissions are based on entrance exam and merit of the candidates. The university conducts HRIT HNAT test to shortlist candidates for admission. Besides, the university also accepts scores in UGAT, PG admission test conducted by AKTU, etc. HRIT University offers courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels. The university offers programmes across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Science, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: HRIT University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Candidates can apply for the preferred course online. The university shortlists candidates based on their scores in university or national-level entrance test. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for popular HRIT University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Intermediate exam of UP Board or Class 12 exam or its equivalent with Physics and Mathematics and one of the optional subjects-Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category)
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates)
BCA/ BSc/ BCom/ BCA of a minimum of 3 years with Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates)
BE/ BTech in relevant subjects with at least 50% aggregate or equivalent CGPA
courses_table.selection_criteria: PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU + Counselling/ HRIT HNAT Test

faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Intermediate exam of UP Board or Class 12 exam or its equivalent with Physics and Mathematics and one of the optional subjects-Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech course at HRIT University.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at HRIT University?

admission_process.title: HRIT University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: HRIT University admissions are open currently. Candidates can check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1. Application Process
Aspirants can apply on the official website of university. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 for a course.
2. Selection

The university reviews the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility. HRIT University conducts HRIT HNAT Test to select candidates for admission. Besides, the university also accepts scores in UGAT, PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU, GPAT, etc. for specific courses.
3. Counselling & Admission Confirmation

Aspirants selected based on PG Admission Test of AKTU are offered seats via counselling. For all other courses, candidates receive an email about their selection. Candidates need to report at the campus with the documents and pay theHRIT University feesto confirm their seat. Check below the documents required at the time of admission:
lists: Original Allotment Letter (if this seat is allotted via counselling)
Migration Certificate (if not passed Class 12 from UP Board)
Affidavit in case of any gap in study
Caste Certificate for SC, ST, OBC only
Graduation/ diploma marksheets of all years

courses_data.name: HRIT University BTech Admission 2025
cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers a four-year BTech course at the UG level. The course is spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inCSE, CSE with IBM,AI & ML, Cyber Security, Data Science & Cloud Computing, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with compulsory and optional subjects with at least 50% aggregate can apply for this course. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Does HRIT University offer lateral entry to BTech?
faqs.answer: HRIT University does offer lateral entry to BTech course. Aspirants who have completed a three-year Diploma in Engineering with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants who have passed a three-year BSc can also apply.

courses_data.name: HRIT University MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, JEECUP
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers MBA for two-years at the PG level. The university offers MBA General, Healthcare Management, Business Analytics (Industry Integrated) and Digital Marketing (Industry Integrated). Admission to MBA is based on HRIT HNAT Test scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at HRIT University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass bachelor's degree of a minimum of three years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates) to apply for MBA at HRIT University.

courses_data.name: HRIT University MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, JEECUP
courses_data.description: HRIT University offers MBA for two-years at the PG level. The university offers MBA General, Healthcare Management, Business Analytics (Industry Integrated) and Digital Marketing (Industry Integrated). Admission to MBA is based on HRIT HNAT Test scores of the candidates.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at HRIT University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass bachelor's degree of a minimum of three years from any recognised university or its equivalent with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST category candidates) to apply for MBA at HRIT University.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at HRIT University without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: HRIT University conducts HRIT HNAT Test to shortlist candidates for admission. The university also accepts scores in GPAT, UGAT, PG Admission Test conducted by AKTU, etc. for specific programmes. Hence, admission to most of the courses is entrance-based.

hostel_campus.college_name: HRIT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The HRIT college of Duhai.
reviews.review_text: All labs were neat and clean but non-AC. Wi-Fi was not working on the campus of HRIT. Classroom was average and projector class was good. Seminar halls were very good. Library was also average but all books were available for study. College canteen was also very big and had good service.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The campus was well-maintained with modern classrooms, labs, and a high-speed Wi-Fi facility. The library had a wide range of academic resources. The hostel facilities were decent, with good food in the mess and basic medical services available. Sports facilities and common rooms were also available for relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average private college. Those who want to study B.Tech or B. Pharm can go to this college.
reviews.review_text: The food and hostel quality were below average. There was no medical facility. There were only a few sports to play. The infrastructure was poor, with no Wi-Fi, no AC and labs with only a few equipment. There were no smart boards or computers. Classrooms and washrooms were damaged, with no water. There was a playground and open badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members of our college are well-qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is also very good. There are 5 Wi-Fi connections in our hostel. The mess food is also tasty. There is no ragging in our college. The environment of our college is very good. The ground of our college is also big with greenery.

reviews.review_heading: COLLEGE – A Beautiful Journey.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are available in the college. The hostel is not very bad but not very good. Wi-Fi is available on every floor of the hostel. The structure of the building is quite good, and every department has its own library. Every department has its own buildings, and the most important thing is that sports activities are organized in our college. There are different grounds for activities, and the institute also has two canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who really wants to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. The college has all labs of all departments. But the only problem is that the majority of the classrooms are non-AC in 2024 (they are improving infrastructure). Library is fine; all the libraries have AC and almost all types of books are available, from accounting to normal standard books.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not good and the classes are not well maintained.
reviews.review_text: The pharmacy department is not well maintained. Lab equipment is missing, and they provide expired chemicals for experiments. Wi-Fi is not available, and the canteen menu is not very extensive. There are two canteens on campus, but neither has adequate seating.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are not air-conditioned. Mess and canteen are available but the food quality is not good. Medical facilities and sports events are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HRIT Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very huge, but not well-organised. Our college has a library. There is no sports ground in our college. Wi-Fi won't work at any time. There is no lab work done in our college. The food served in the canteen and hostel is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of HRIT Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Free, unlimited Wi-Fi is available. The ground is good. Many types of sports, like shooting ball, volleyball, and cricket, are conducted. Good water is available. There is proper management at the hostel. The food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and its building is very good. All labs are well-maintained. Computers have very old windows operating systems. The library is very huge. All books are available in the library. The food served in the mess is good. Our college campus has 3 sports grounds and 2 canteens. Our college has an 8-ball pool table.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of the way of teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is adequate, but the services provided could be improved. The library has only course books available. Wi-Fi is available only to teachers. The quality of food served in the hostel mess is not good and hygienic so the canteen is a better option. Sports and games facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good value for money. Our teachers provide us with knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Classrooms are good. The furniture and structure of our college buildings are good. Sports grounds and cricket grounds are available in our college for sports. Canteens are good.

reviews.review_heading: College is okay for graduation but not advised for PG.
reviews.review_text: There are very poor facilities available like as no Wi-Fi for students and not classrooms are also not much smart and in library, there are not much books available related to my course. Hostel facilities are also bad as food available is very unhygienic .

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides Wi-Fi for staff only. Our library is not well-maintained. The hostel facilities are not good. The food served in the mess and canteen is not hygienic.

highlights.summary: Girijananda Chowdhury University admissions 2025 are open for all the courses. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website.

college_info.intro: Girijananda Chowdhury University provides BTech and MBA as its flagship programmes. BTech is provided in several specialisations, including Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, Computer Science and Engineering, and Electronics and Communication, among many others. It is facilitated by the School of Engineering and Technology for the duration of 4 years. The MBA is offered through the School of Management and Commerce. It is served for 2 years. Candidates can take a look below at the Girijananda Chowdhury University popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Girijananda Chowdhury University offers a wide range of , , and programmes across various specialisations. At the UG level, courses such as , , , , and are provided for the duration of 3 years. On the other hand, courses such as MA, , , MCom, and are provided at the PG level. All these courses are facilitated through 7 schools of study. The fees for various courses may vary based on the type and level of the program. Candidates can take a look below at the Girijananda Chowdhury University courses, along with their fees and eligibility:

review_summary.college_name: Girijananda Chowdhury University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are good. Totally the college is worth it.

content.Placements: 75-80% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary is 8 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top companies include Flipkart, Amazon, TCS, etc. Our college itself offers an internship called the Summer Internship Programme. Top roles include manager, researcher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and environment of our college is good. Labs are well maintained, and classrooms are equipped with good facilities. The library is well maintained and has all books required by students. The quality of the hostel facilities and the food is good to eat. Different meals are provided every day, and they are worth eating. The canteen is also large and offers a variety of food items at affordable prices. The college also gives importance to medical facilities, sports, and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and worth experiencing a college life here.

content.Placements: 30% of students were placed until March and many more companies are yet to come. The highest was 7 LPA, the lowest was 3.5 LPA, and the average is around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include construction companies like RDC concrete, Taj Cement, Patel Engineering, etc. Till now, no one has gotten an internship from our course in any company. The top role offered in our course is Graduate Engineer Trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the food is not good but the hostel offers Wi-Fi and minimal but good furniture for accommodation. Hostel rooms are not so good. Indoor and outdoor stadiums are available and a gym with proper equipment is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Girijananda Chowdhury Institute of Management and Technology, Guwahati.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our course. Top recruiting companies are Vodafone and Jio. Our college provides better placements compared to private colleges. This college is a part of the new revolution. They are building new careers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. All the required study materials and labs are provided in our college. They are accessible to the students. The equipments are up to date. Classrooms are smart. AICTE lab was newly formed. The library contains all the books and materials. Classrooms are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teachers and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Wi-Fi connection is also enabled. There are many libraries with air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner facilities. Hostels are good and affordable for students. The food quality is also good according to the prices.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are very friendly and helpful. Their teaching techniques are also advanced and interesting. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Semester exams are difficult but we can pass easily.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and provides good placements.

content.Placements: Placement scenario of our college is average. Around 50 to 80 students get placed in the campus drive every year. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byju's, Luit minerals, Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good laboratory facilities. Classrooms are not up to the mark but this college has very good library facilities. The quality of food served in the canteen is very poor. Medical facilities are not good. Management should improve the quality of the college in the future.

admission_overview.college_name: Girijananda Chowdhury University Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: Girijananda Chowdhury University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Girijananda Chowdhury University admission 2025is open for allUG, PG, doctoral, and Diploma courses. Admission to the university is merit-based.Girijananda Chowdhury Universityoffers various courses in the fields ofEngineering, Management, Commerce, and Pharmacyamong others such asBTech, MBA, MTech, etc. Candidates willing to apply forGirijananda Chowdhury University admission 2025are required to apply online by visiting the university's official website. If you want to know more about theGirijananda Chowdhury University admission process for 2025read below:
Girijananda Chowdhury University Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

Girijananda Chowdhury University admissionto all the courses is merit-based. The university offers anonline mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Candidates seeking admission to Girijananda Chowdhury University can check out the updated information related toGirijananda Chowdhury University coursesalong with selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Graduation with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Merit-Based
Passed graduation examination in Math Stream with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Merit-Based
Steps forGirijananda Chowdhury University Admission Process2025

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Girijananda Chowdhury University?

hostel_campus.college_name: Girijananda Chowdhury University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are good. Totally the college is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of our college is good. Labs are well maintained, and classrooms are equipped with good facilities. The library is well maintained and has all books required by students. The quality of the hostel facilities and the food is good to eat. Different meals are provided every day, and they are worth eating. The canteen is also large and offers a variety of food items at affordable prices. The college also gives importance to medical facilities, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and worth experiencing a college life here.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the food is not good but the hostel offers Wi-Fi and minimal but good furniture for accommodation. Hostel rooms are not so good. Indoor and outdoor stadiums are available and a gym with proper equipment is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Girijananda Chowdhury Institute of Management and Technology, Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All the required study materials and labs are provided in our college. They are accessible to the students. The equipments are up to date. Classrooms are smart. AICTE lab was newly formed. The library contains all the books and materials. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teachers and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Wi-Fi connection is also enabled. There are many libraries with air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner facilities. Hostels are good and affordable for students. The food quality is also good according to the prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good laboratory facilities. Classrooms are not up to the mark but this college has very good library facilities. The quality of food served in the canteen is very poor. Medical facilities are not good. Management should improve the quality of the college in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are the best part of the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and spacious with ample amount of sunlight coming in. All the facilities are nice. Washrooms are clean. Computer labs are available with free Wi-Fi access and clean drinking water. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious and the food in the canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Girijananda Chowdhury Institute of Management and Technology, Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: We have a Wi-Fi facility with good internet speed. There are 6 laboratories, and each laboratory has Wi-Fi, printers, and a scanner. There is a server room that handles all machines that are available in 6 laboratories. It also provides a library. Projector facility is also available for presentations, workshops, and seminars. In this college, hostel facility is not available. But we have a great canteen. Our campus is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very dissatisfied with campus life, crowd, high fee, and worse value for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure consists of an average library, average labs, below-average classrooms, and no Wi-Fi. Hostel is the worst. Mess and canteen are horrible. Medical facilities are below average. Sports and games are not given much importance.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly college with friendly staff.
reviews.review_text: The computer lab is big and fully air conditioned throughout the summer days. Wi-Fi connection is also available on the college campus with decent speeds. The library is also air-conditioned with a digital space available to browse the internet or do work. The food provided by the canteen is decent and cheap as well with a wide variety of beverage options available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to pursue a course at an affordable budget.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-equipped library, good campus, well-equipped labs, good faculty members, a huge canteen, playground, gymnasium, recreation areas, etc. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there are two huge well-equipped auditoriums, which have an accommodation capacity of 300-400 people. Hostels are also well-equipped and have all the necessary amenities. The quality of the food served is also good, whether be in the hostel or canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Great college, if you're not too high on expectations.
reviews.review_text:
1. Labs are adequate for Mechanical department. Have almost all the machines. Huge library with over 5k books. Wi-Fi campus, but not the fastest. Classroom with smart boards, but lacks AC. 
2. Both Girls and boys hostel in-campus. Nursing room, ambulance etc. Available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classroom conditions are good. Good lab, library facilities are there also. The canteen food is not so bad. Boys and girls hostel is inside the college campus. Other facilities like the gym, playground are provided by the college. The atmosphere inside the college campus is helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The College is near the "Dipor bil" ( bird sanctuary of Assam) Azara, Guwahati. The main building is divided into 5 floors. The first floor comprise of Mechanical branch and lab. 
2nd floor electrical and electronic branch and lab. 
3rd floor computer Science
4th floor applied electronics and instrumentation. 
5th floor consist of AEI lab and auditorium. 
2nd building consist of admission cell, library. Boys and girls hostel are in campus. 
In the backyard of main building, playground and gym ar...

reviews.review_heading: The best private college in Assam in terms of faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have well-maintained labs with air-conditioners, Wi-Fi facilities, a sickbay, and a conference hall. There are two lifts in the main building and one in the administrative building. The canteen of our college is huge and has a seating capacity of around 200 students at a time. There is also a pharmacy on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college among private institutions.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the Wi-Fi facility. Almost all classrooms are equipped with projectors. Labs are well-equipped. Quality of food served in the canteen is average. However, there are lots of food options available outside the college. Library also has a good collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Royal College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: The college has the best placement team. They didn't come for us. They even gave us support. About 90% of students got jobs. They told the remaining 10% of students how to get a job. If, for some reason, you don't get a job, you will receive all the assistance you need from them, and it will continue until you get a job.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very nice atmosphere and aesthetic interior. The host food is very good, the test and hostel are very clean, and the hostel warden is very friendly. He has a good helping mentality. The hostel warden helps students day and night. Even if it is night, everyone goes to him if they need anything.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: College provides placements in so many companies almost every student got placed in my batch. Companies like STPI (Software Technological Park of India), MS Swaminathan Research Foundation, Nippo Batteries, Kovur Sugar Factor, and Ashok Leyland come to our campus.
content.Infrastructure: In the second and third years, there is a shift in the course structure as you learn the advanced concepts of the two branches of economics as well as understand econometrics, financial, and international economics. Overall, the course syllabus is well planned out and on graduation, a student becomes well-versed with the concepts of Economics. Hostels are super cool, but only 2 students per course get the accommodation there which is again based on how you performed in 12th. Fees, like back then I paid just Rs. 10,000 per year. Mess food is okay.

hostel_campus.college_name: Royal College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Royal College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very nice atmosphere and aesthetic interior. The host food is very good, the test and hostel are very clean, and the hostel warden is very friendly. He has a good helping mentality. The hostel warden helps students day and night. Even if it is night, everyone goes to him if they need anything.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: In the second and third years, there is a shift in the course structure as you learn the advanced concepts of the two branches of economics as well as understand econometrics, financial, and international economics. Overall, the course syllabus is well planned out and on graduation, a student becomes well-versed with the concepts of Economics. Hostels are super cool, but only 2 students per course get the accommodation there which is again based on how you performed in 12th. Fees, like back then...

reviews.review_heading: Placement cells are also too good and make industry ready.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my department were too good. Wi-Fi connectivity was also good in the labs. Infrastructure was best full version and classroom. Food facilities in my college were too much good. Food quality was also good and so tasty.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with the best and outstanding faculty. Very good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college provides a great atmosphere for the students and faculty through their cleanliness and peaceful environment. The Wi-Fi facility brought into college is comparatively good. Labs are equipped with systems from good companies. Classrooms have facilities for smart classes and have large spaces to accommodate a huge number of students. The library provides books that are needed for us; it helps gather information and develop our skills. The hostel quality is average, and the food is modera...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Royal College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. Many high-technology labs are available in our course. The hostel facilities are good. A gymnasium is available in the hostel. The hostel and canteen facilities are good. Medical facilities are very good. Sports and games are conducted regularly. Students can participate and polish their skills.

reviews.review_heading: Somehow dissatisfied! A lot to be improved.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the department lab, classrooms, library everything are rated to be average according to my opinion. The library is better compared to that of programming labs. Programming labs still contains lot of malfunctioning systems which need to replaced. There is a moderate amount of systems which works properly. Wi-Fi is generally not accessible to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure Best IEDC team and NSS .
reviews.review_text:
Classrooms have a projector to present slides for teaching. Every lab and department has a separate Wi-Fi facility.
Our college is good at providing all support to enhance the sports skill.
A lot of students are coming from distant places, so the canteen foods are their relief to appetite.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and friendly atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are separate blocks for civil, electrical and mechanical engineering. Workshops are available. The campus has gardens. A girls' hostel is available on campus, and the boys' hostel is outside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, atmosphere of the college is pleasing.
reviews.review_text: Overall, infrastructure of the college is good. The libraries are vast and they encourage students to read and engage in doing their assignments. Hostel has a lot of occupancy. Food is available 3 times a day and in evening, tea and snacks are provided. The quality of food provided is good.

reviews.review_heading: There are good campus and atmosphere here.
reviews.review_text: A good campus and a nice atmosphere with no sound from outside. Also, the college here is situated in Thrissur district, the cultural place of Kerala. RCET is blessed with a wonderful campus of 35 acres surrounded by lush and serene natural beauty. This college campus is also in a film called the Happy wedding.

reviews.review_heading: A good choice for quite some conservative and studious students but it is not completely bad.
reviews.review_text:
The college facilities are good. The hostel has tidy and neat rooms and the food is good.
Lab facilities are also good.
Every game is played.
Courts for different games are there on the campus.
Achievements- 3rd in e-zone KTU football championship.
Auditorium is not there in the college for conducting events but there's an area for stage.

A canteen is available inside the campus and the food is okay.
Transportation facilities are less. They have college buses from all areas but public transport...

reviews.review_heading: Bad faculty, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is spread over twelve acres of land inside what feels like a dense forest. Hence the atmosphere is not disturbing like other colleges. Since the college is a private self-funding college, almost every student is satisfied with the infrastructure and other facilities. Royal's infrastructure is an aggregate of international styled central library, well-equipped laboratories with safeguards, canteen, separate hostels for boys and girls with rooms which accommodates around six pe...

The infrastructure of the college is appreciable. It has good facilities with good labs. College campus is always neat and clean. Student’s politics is in diluted version and I consider it as positive. Faculties are not up to the mark. Many have not any good knowledge about their subjects. The college's placement cell is the worst department and don't expect campus interviews from this college. The infrastructure of the college is appreciable. It has good facilities with good labs. College campus is always neat and clean. Student’s politics is in diluted version and I consider it as positive. Faculties are not up to the mark. Many have not any good knowledge about their subjects. The college's placement cell is the worst department and don't expect campus interviews from this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college ambiance is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is too laggy. Because when we conmect the laptops or computer, it sometimes lag. Classrooms are okay while comparing to other colleges. In library the network is too much laggy. And sometimes the electricity will go off. The food in canteen was so much bad and sports was good.

reviews.review_heading: Royal College of Engineering and Technology (KTU) review.
reviews.review_text: The civil engineering course labs do not contain the required equipment for the required work that we were studying. Most of the equipment was either damaged or not available. I still remember my friends going to other colleges to do their tests for the final year project.

college_info.college_name: PDKV - Dr Panjabrao Deshmukh Krishi Vidyapeeth: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the PDKV - Dr Panjabrao Deshmukh Krishi Vidyapeeth:

placements.overview: Established in 1969, PDKV - Dr Panjabrao Deshmukh Krishi Vidyapeeth is located in Akola, Maharashtra. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. These courses are offered in Full Time and Part Time mode. A total of 81 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied, and I recommend it to others. The placements and infrastructure in 2024 were good.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students from our batch get placed in reputed companies, mainly in agriculture-based industries. Top recruiters include Boyer, SEED companies, and agro-tech firms. The average package is around 3-4 LPA, while the highest goes up to 6 LPA. Internships are also offered in reputed research organizations and agribusinesses. Students are mostly hired for roles like Agri Officers, Sales Executives, and Research Associates.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university has decent infrastructure with well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled libraries, and modern classrooms. The hostel is comfortable and has good amenities, including 24/7 water, electricity, and security. The food in the mess is hygienic and satisfactory. The campus also has sports grounds, a gym, and basic medical facilities. Overall, the living conditions and academic infrastructure are satisfactory.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great college campus with well-qualified lecturers and an average hostel. Dissatisfied with the mess

review_content.Placements: College placements in recent years have been very good. Many passouts got placements in private and government sectors but majorly in government sectors. About 30-45% of students got placements. The average salary package offered is 7 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Trident, Mahindra, Nirmal sees, Yashoda sees, Krushi Sevak, etc. Agriculture officer, field officer, bank manager, etc., roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building of the college is one of the Heritage buildings of Nagpur. It was built in the 1850s as a palace for Queen Victoria. It turned into a college in 1906. It is one of the first few colleges established in India. It is an enormous college campus spanning over 800 acres having horticultural, agronomy, and agroforestry fields. This college is the only one having its own zoo named Maharaj Bagh. There are fields for practical experience. The hostel is old and lacks facilities. The mess is below average. The college has a competitive exam forum for preparation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Bio-Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It's best college for education as well as enjoy college life.

review_content.Placements: There is average placement provided to the students, with companies like Kaveri Agri, Ashish Agro, Ankur Seeds, and Grow More Fertilizers participating in this placement program. The placement program has a very relaxed process and a 100% placement guarantee.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college, including labs, classrooms, and the library, is very impressive. The infrastructure can be improved, particularly with regard to the sports ground and parking. Other than that, everything else is excellent in this college. There are gardens, a gym, a canteen, a poultry, an animal house, and a sports ground also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent college for pursuing B.Sc. Agriculture degree. Number second college in Maharashtra.

review_content.Placements: 1. Usually, students opt for higher education M.Sc 2. The number of recruiters is smaller. 3. The average number of students (4-5) are placed. 4. A direct internship is not offered to students. 5. It has lots of opportunities for jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. Hostel facilities are too good. 2. A hostel is precious. 3. There is a need for the renovation of the hostel. 4. There is a special hostel for every field. 5. There is a library present in the hostel. 6. 24 hours of running water are there. 7. Availability of newspapers and magazines in the hostel library is there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A good experience overall and a really good environment.

review_content.Placements: 1) Usually, students opt for higher education M.Sc. 2) The number of recruiters is smaller. 3) The average number of students (4-5) are placed in SEED and fertilizers. 4) A direct internship is not provided by the college but the raw and elm program last year helped shape students.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1) The college's infrastructure is good, as the building's old surrounding environment is aesthetic. 2) There is a separate hostel for each faculty but some hostels are old and buildings require renovation. 3) Leakage of water and availability of water are problems on campus. 4) On the college campus, there is a forum that provides a good environment for students to take competitive exams. .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: 1)Usually students opt for higher education M.Sc/MBA. 2) Even though the number of recruiters is smaller, notable recruiters include HDFC Bank, Mahyco Seeds, Sangeeta, Kribhco and other pesticide companies. 3) The average number of students placed is up 10 to 12, as students aren't quite interested in jobs, and another reason is that the company's salary structure doesn't meet students' expectations. 4) A direct internship is not offered to students. It was involved in the curriculum in the last year of the degree I, i.e., the RAWE program and ELM modules.

college_info.intro:
Regent Education and Research Foundation offers UG, PG, and diploma courses. The popular courses offered at RERF are BTech and MBA. The various BTech branches available in the institution are Civil, CSE, ECE, EE, EEE and Mechanical.
Admission are done on the basis of merit and entrance. Students must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 and 50% in graduation, considering the respective choice of UG or PG level course. Moreover, candidates must secure valid scores in WBJEE, WBJEE JECA, JEE Main or any other equivalent exam. RERF MBA and PGDM are offered with the tuition fees between INR 2.5 Lakh to INR 3.8 Lakh.

admission_overview.college_name: Regent Education and Research Foundation Course Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: RERF - Regent Education and Research Foundation Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Regent Education and Research Foundation admission 2025is based on entrance/merit-based. The college offers B.E., MBA, MCA, etc., courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers certificate courses. To be admitted to theRegent Education and Research Foundation, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. RERF is affiliated withMAKAUT. The RERF - Regent Education and Research Foundation application process is conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theRERF - Regent Education and Research Foundation course admission2025.

Regent Education and Research Foundation admission is entrance-based. Further, for certificate courses college offers merit-based admission. To be eligible for admission to the college, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility and selection criteria for their respective courses. The basic eligibility criteria for UG and PG is to pass Class 12 and UG degrees, respectively from a recognised board/university with 45-50% aggregate and for certificate courses pass Class 10 and Class 12 from a recognised board. After, filling out the eligibility candidates are required to apply and appear for the WBJEE, JEE Main, MAT, CAT and other entrance exams for admission to B.E., MBA and MCA courses. Additionaly candidates are required to apply online for admission. To check other details aboutRegent Education and Research Foundation courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
WBJEE,JEE Main
Graduation with a 45%-50% aggregate
Bachelor of Computer Application or Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science Engineering with a 50% aggregate
Certificate
Merit-based

Regent Education and Research Foundation admission is entrance-based for all the courses. Further, for certificate courses, the college offers admission based on the last qualifying exam scores. Candidates are required to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process to get admission. Find below the detailed Regent Education and Research Foundation admission process 2025:
Step 1: Regent Education and Research Foundation Application Process 2025

Regent Education and Research Foundation application process is carried out in online mode. Applicants must apply by visiting the official websites of respective courses using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications.
Step 2: Regent Education and Research Foundation Rounds 2025

After filling out the online application form, applicants must appear for the respective entrance exam for their desired courses. The shortlisted candidates have to appear for further counselling rounds for their desired courses.
Step 3: Regent Education and Research Foundation Final seat Allocation

After the completion of all the selection rounds and counselling rounds. The college releases the cutoff list of the shortlisted applicants. Students who get their names on the cutoff list are then requested to visit the institute for reporting, upload documents, and pay theRegent Education and Research Foundation feeto confirm their seats.

placement_data.title: RERF Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The Regent Education and Research Foundation has a Training and Placement Cell which has contact with over 30 companies. With every passing year, the number of recruiting organizations has increased in geometric progression with an average of about 100 nationally renowned organizations visiting the campus annually. The Cell is equipped with infrastructure to support each and every stage of the placement process such as pre-placement talk rooms, group discussion rooms equipped with LCD projectors, PCs and audio-video facilities.

As per the latest official report, 110 students were placed during the 2023 drive held for MBA , BTech , and other courses. The highest package offered to the students was INR 5.50 LPA+ incentives of INR 3 LPA . Amazon, Kaiser Appliances, Keventer Agro , and many other leading companies were part of Regent Education and Research Foundation placements 2023. The table below represents the complete insights:

hostel_campus.college_name: Regent Education and Research Foundation Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Regent Research Institute - Experience.
reviews.review_text: The campus lacks Wi-Fi coverage. Our college has plenty of labs including a startup hub. The architecture of the campus is nice with plenty of open space, clean air, and greenery. A playground is under construction, so sports availability is hampered. Inside and outside of the campus, student welfare activities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is good, medical facilities are okay, and sports and games are not that good. Labs are good, classrooms are well-decorated, and the library is very good and well-decorated. Sports events occur often, sometimes in winter and sometimes in summer. They mainly focus on football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: My college is RERF Sunshine.
reviews.review_text: The lab is very clean and clear with high-speed Wi-Fi. The classrooms are also well-decorated. All books are available in the library, and the canteen is clean, offering good food at a reasonable price. All facilities are accessible in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are okay types & also labs are not very good or bad. But library is very poor & no Wi-Fi facilities are there in our college campus. There are no hostel facilities. Food quality of the canteen is very bad. Only indoor sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are available in the college.
reviews.review_text: The lab is very clean and clear with high-speed Wi-Fi. The classroom is very good with nice decoration. All book is available in the library. All facilities are available. Food quality is good. The canteen is very clean and clear and the food is also very good at reasonable price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a very good infrastructure and every faculty is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have any specific hostel. There are many boys and girls hostels around the college where students of all colleges stay. All those hostels are very clean and have Wi-Fi facilities. The cooking of the hostel there is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is not good college to take admission.
reviews.review_text: This college does not provide proper infrastructure. They do not even have a hostel. Laboratories have old-age technology, and classrooms are suffocating. The canteen food is average, they even charge same as others fee as the government has given Rs 2 per kg rice.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with a very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good and the campus is very clean. Classrooms are very good and labs are also good but need little improvement. The college staffs are really good and very humble.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in the covid situation.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures. In our college, the education and research foundation has its own Wi-Fi, a top-class library, and very good classrooms with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi is available. Hostel people are good, and they also provide very good food according to the charges.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college, but it needs to be updated.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good. The quality of the canteen food is good, and the prices are reasonable. Sports and other activities are conducted very often. There is only one library. Wi-Fi connection is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Regent Education and Research Foundation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good here, and the facilities provided by the college are very helpful for every student. You can stay in the college hostel. The facilities are very good there. The quality of food served is good, and its taste is also good. Hospitals are situated near the college. Our college has its own ground. Every year annual sports are being held by sports authority.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Regent Education and Research Foundation.
reviews.review_text: The respected teachers are the most loveable, and the way they teach each of the students is very beneficial and delightful. There are individual labs and classrooms for each department. A huge library is available. Most of the semester books are distributed by the college. Free Wi-Fi is available. There are lots of hostels with good canteen, medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Regent Education and Research Foundation.
reviews.review_text: The college is good enough to see from the outside. The area is huge, and there are also Wi-Fi and labs with modern equipment. Nearly about 35,000 volumes of books are available in the library. There are also various types of books in the college. There is also a college hostel for girls. Every year sports have been conducted here at the time of February and March.

reviews.review_heading: If good coaching is provided, then any college student can get a good job or start a business.
reviews.review_text: On our campus, the speed of Wi-Fi is very low, and none of the students use this Wi-Fi. Labs are decent and clean, and the classrooms are good and clean. The library is not much good, and faculty members in it are very rude and have disgusting behaviour. The canteen is not much good, and sports are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Fairly satisfied due to the faculty support and huge infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as the campus is huge. Inbuilt school and other college are also present in it. Diploma B.A and management college are presently there. The faculty members are well-qualified and friendly. Classrooms and labs are present. The hostel is not available on the campus, you have to stay on rent.

college_info.college_name: Regent Education and Research Foundation

data.description: Regent Education and Research Foundation RERF has a blend of teaching, non-teaching and other teaching staffs that are segregated department-wise. These faculty members are qualified and experts in their respective fields. An expert panel of faculty usually proves to be a boon for the students which is also evident by the growth of the institute. The institute has 8 departments and a strength of around 180 faculty members combining teaching, non-teaching and other teaching staff. With a work experience of 2 years to 15 years , RERF consists of faculty members as professors, assistant professors and associate professors.

college_info.intro:
The Jerusalem College of Engineering, Chennai is known for its Engineering courses with the UG level BE/ BTech being the most popular popular programme of the institiute. The JCE BE/ BTech is extended under a number of specialisations and is highly sought-after for its placements with BTech graduates being offered a range of job roles in technical positions across the fields of Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, AI & Data Science, IT, Biomedical Engineering, etc.
The BTech programme at Jerusalem College of Engineering are offered in affiliation with Anna University and has also been approved by the AICTE with its CSE and Biomedical Engineering specialisations being accredited by the NBA as well. Some other popular courses of JCE Chennai is its MBA programme which is highly attractive for companies looking to fill leadership positions. admission_overview.college_name: Jerusalem College of Engineering Admission 2026 : Eligibility, Application, Fee & Selection

admission_overview.title: Jerusalem College of Engineering Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Jerusalem College of Engineering admissions are open for 2026. The college accepts national or state-level entrance exams like TANCET MBA, TNEA and GATE for specific courses. Jerusalem College of Engineering offers courses at UG and PG levels such as BE/BTech, ME/MTech and MBA. The UG course is of four year duration and PG course is of two year duration.

eligibility_selection.title: Jerusalem College of Engineering Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Jerusalem College of Engineering admission 2026 is primarily entrance-based. Applicants must fill out the course-specific eligibility criteria and selection process for admission. For admission to the B.Tech programme, candidates are required to appear for the TNEA exam. Also, for admission to the M.Tech and MBA programmes, candidates need to appear for the GATE and TANCET exams. Students have to fill the online application form on college's website.

faqs.answer: The basic eligibility for taking admission in BE/BTech programme at Jerusalem College of Engineering is that the student should have passed CLass 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Maths with at least 45% marks They are required to fill the application form of college. Final admissions are done on TNEA counselling.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for taking admission in BE/BTech programme at Jerusalem College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Jerusalem College of Engineering accepts GATE/ CEETA PG exam score. Students also have to fill online application form of the college to apply for this course. This information may vary due to lack of precise information on the college website.
faqs.question: What entrance exam is accepted at Jerusalem College of Engineering for ME/MTech course?

faqs.answer: Candidates applying for PG courses at Jerusalem College of Engineering should score at least 50% marks in last qualifying exam or graduation to be eligible for PG courses. They have to appear for entranec test and fill an online application form. This information may vary due to lack of exact information on the college website.
faqs.question: How much minimum marks is required to be eligible for PG courses at Jerusalem College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Yes, students must pay an application/ registration fee while applying for Jerusalem College of Engineering admissions. This fee is to be paid to the exam conducting body while applying for the required exam or counselling process such as TNEA. The fee can be paid online through Net Banking while candidates are applying for their preferred course. Though the application has not been clearly mentioned students can go through the institute page for more information.
faqs.question: Are there any application fees for Jerusalem College of Engineering admissions?

admission_process.title: Jerusalem College of Engineering Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Jerusalem College of Engineering admissionsbegin with the registration process. The college offers UG and PG courses in different specialisations. Candidates should check eligibility before applying to any course.
Aspirants can follow the below steps to get a seat in Jerusalem College of Engineering:
Application Process
Candidates after qualifying the basic eligibility criteria or accepted entrance exam can apply for any of the JCE courses. Aspirants need to register online with an application fee.
Selection Rounds

The institute accepts scores of TNEA for admission to the B.Tech & BE programmes. Also, for admission to M.Tech and MBA programmes, candidates are required to have valid scores in GATE and TANCET, respectively.
Counselling

After selection, shortlisted candidates are called for counselling and document verification. TNEA Counselling is required for BTech admission. Aspirants need to bring specified documents and pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: When will Anna University release TANCET results?
faqs.answer: Anna University releases the TANCET results within a month of the exam date. Soon after the release of the TANCET results, Anna University schedules the release of TANCET scorecard. Candidates can download the TANCET scorecard using the same link within a specified period. After closing of the window to download the scorecard, candidates have to pay a processing fee to get the duplicate TANCET scorecard. TANCET scorecard and hall ticket is required at the time of document verification.

reviews.review_heading: Jerusalem College of Engineering is the best college in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: In my department (Information Technology), the college provides Wi-Fi, labs, a sense board, classrooms, a library, and purified water. The hostel provides a room, food, purified water, a dining table with chairs, and indoor games like a chessboard and a carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the knowledge we are gain.
reviews.review_text: In our classrooms, we have more technical features like smart boards. We study everything in practical ways. Hostel food nowadays tastes good and very hygienic food is available here. Sports are also available and many games are there for our enjoyment.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat I am okay with this college.
reviews.review_text: As a day scholar, the canteen has many food varieties, but the hostel food is worse, they are eating the same food menu every day. Other than that, the lab facilities are good enough for an IT student. Also, there are many extracurricular activities like sports, clubs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college and is top-rated in Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The labs are maintained properly and the classrooms are well-developed. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi service and a three-floored library with multiple labs. Sports such as NCC, JRC, volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi are available. The college also conducts badminton, carrom, chess, and table tennis matches, and there are four PT masters.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because it is a good place to gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: In our college, labs, seminar hall, Wi-Fi, classroom, and all very peaceful places. Our department staff is really great. They can help anytime. My college hostel is one of the most safest places especially for girls in food. Canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Decent College | Inside The City | Disciplined.
reviews.review_text: Labs are decent and have systems with good specifications. Classrooms are equipped with smart boards, and there is Wi-Fi. The hostel food is not okay; many prefer nearby PGs. Canteen food is average, and there isn't much. Sports facilities are pretty good. The library is there with 3 floors.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good but has a small campus.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good but a little small. We have a library, a first aid room, a canteen, etc. Hostel facilities are good. They provide food three times a day and 2 times snacks. Our college supports all games and has playgrounds for volleyball, throwball, basketball, and futsal.

reviews.review_heading: Good college experience for me. Some might find it too strict, but it's good.
reviews.review_text: Since I'm a day scholar, I don't know about hostels, and as for the infrastructure, it's good with all its green outside the buildings. Mess is clean, and we can enjoy food at the tables like however we want, no strict rules in mess. It's all about enjoying food.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty members and good placements last year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very neat and good. Classrooms are enabled with smart boards and Wi-Fi. The library consists of a separate floor only for our department books. The department of physical education focuses on cricket, badminton, volleyball, and throwball.

reviews.review_heading: A peaceful place to learn and grow.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi for each department is separate, and our department also has a separate library. The classroom has a separate smart board. The Department of Physical Education focuses on sports like volleyball, throwball, cricket, badminton, table tennis, carrom, and chess.

reviews.review_heading: JERUSALEM COLLEGE CURRENT STATUS (2024) in my point of view.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi in the hostel with decent rooms, food, and a canteen available with a lot of snacks and a xerox shop. IN LAB's with LAN, AC, and well-performing PCs in the lab for all courses and departments. Decent classrooms with smartboards in some classes and projectors, but the ventilation is okay. The library is good with all syllabus books and materials.

reviews.review_heading: Cultural activities were good. They conduct very well.
reviews.review_text: A huge library is available with all the facilities. . The college has nice infrastructure and a nature-oriented campus. The campus is not strict. And food quality is good in campus hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty were friendly, and they made an effort.
reviews.review_text: It was an environment-free campus. NSS and YRC were available in our college. They conducted symposiums and cultural events. Many celebrities visited our college. In 2020, they conducted a rally about avoiding plastic so that students could be aware of this. All facilities were provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is good and the infrastructure in the college is upto the standards. The student life is very good in the college as the staff and the supporting staff are maintaining a good relationship with the students in the college as well as when they pass out.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jerusalem College of Engineering, Chennai.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is quite good. And the food is a little better. If we're in an emergency, they arrange an ambulance any day. They give very much importance to sports and games, and lots of our students participate at the district and state levels.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and Technology include BTech and MTech. SVIET BTech programme is offered under multiple specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Civil Engineering.
On the other hand, MTech programme is offered across specialisations, namely CSE, ECE, CE and ME. The course duration of BTech and MTech is 4 years and 2 years, respectively. Students can check the popular programmes offered at Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and Technology in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The core subjects are usually the same. Though the electives differ. Some of the major ones taught are - English, History, Psychology, Political Science, Philosophy, Social work, Economics, Sociology, Anthropology, Rural Studies, and more. Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.Click to know aboutBA Subjects and Specialisations.
faqs.question: Q: What are the subjects taught in BA?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good in terms of fees.

content.Placements: 3 batches are running the unique, super60, and non super60 from unique. Your placement is fixed, depending on your skills, but the average package is 5 to 6 LPA. It is under contract with the company. If you do not have skills, you will be fired after 1 year.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure with playgrounds and a lot of activities, a canteen is available at affordable price, but for medical we have to go out of the college campus. A hospital is present beside the college, Gian Sagar Medical College. Overall, SVIET Punjab offers good infrastructure and supportive facilities for students. While some areas like mess food, can improve. The campus environment, labs, library, and academic support make it a suitable place for learning and growth. Each department has its own dedicated laboratories, and the CSE/IT labs are equipped with updated systems, necessary software, and proper technical support. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and many are fitted with SMART boards to make teaching more interactive. The library is one of the strong points of the campus, offering a wide collection of textbooks, reference material, journals, and a peaceful space for self-study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Budget friendly college.

content.Placements: Nearly 90% of the students secured good placements. The average package goes to 6 LPA, and the highest package goes to 50 LPA. Companies like Jio and Paytm are involved, and the college has several startups on campus as well, providing better industrial training.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are commendable, and they offer good Wi-Fi access; however, it is not available for first-year students. The college is very strict concerning the years, and they maintain rigorous educational standards. Additionally, they have an excellent mess and better IoT labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best review for SVIET College.

content.Placements: Overall, 80% of students are placed in our course with a lot of effort from our placement cell. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Wipro, Caelius Consulting, Antier Solutions, Sensation Solutions, and Infosys. Most roles in our course like web development, MERN stack development, and software development.
content.Infrastructure: The library and labs are fully unbelievable, and the college provides the best facilities to students to get more focus on their studies due to the good environment. The quality of facilities in our hostel is quite good, the food in the mess is of medium level, and the college also provides a canteen, along with sports and games.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and support of a faculty with strong placements.

content.Placements: Overall, the placement percentage is approximately 90%. They have secured placements in top companies. The highest package offered is up to 50 LPA. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A college with best advancement in technologies.

content.Placements: 90%-95% of students each year got placed. The highest package is 48 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Companies that arrive in college are Jio, Infosys, Airtel, Wipro, and start-up-based. Most students placed in Calcius Consulting, in the 5th semester about 90% of students got placed. Roles offered are graphic designer, software trainee, and product-based role.
content.Infrastructure: Facilties we got each student their workstation. Every classroom has internet availability, each class has its smart board. Students has their study room, for washing clothes there is availability of washing machines. The food quality of mess is very good, they only focused on providing nutrient-based food.
