college_info.college_name: BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya admission 2025 is open. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya ranks #13 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

college_info.intro: Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya's popular programmes are BTech and BSc. The institute offers a full-time, four-year programme at the UG level. The institute offers BSc specilisation in Horticulture, Agriculture, Agronomy, Plant Pathology, Seed Science & Technology, and others. The BTech programme is offered in Agricultural Engineering. After pursuing BTech students have the opportunity to work as Food Process Engineers, Irrigation Engineers, Research & Development Experts, and others. Below-mentioned are Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya's popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Sc. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and M.Sc. BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya courses stands around INR 24,440 to 1,17,100.

faqs.answer: A:    Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya has an affordable fee structure as compared to other institutes. The fee structure of the programme ranges between INR 24,440- INR 1.2 lakh. The fee structure includes various components such as Tuition Fees, Hostel Fees, One-time fee and more. As a state-aided university, BCKV receives significant funding from the West Bengal government, which helps to keep tuition fees lower than private institutions.
faqs.question: Why is Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya so costly?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is an above average college having a great campus life, but no placements.

review_content.Placements: No placements are offered by our University, but after completing the degree, the students can appear for several job related exams like AFO, NABARD or may continue their higher studies. No internships are provided by our university, students can appear for other internships offered by other institutions on their own. The university will not provide any help regarding the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library with Wi-Fi facilities and all kinds of practical labs, but the size of the practical lab is too small to accommodate all the students. There is a shortage of classrooms, there are no specific classrooms for specific courses. University has all kinds of hostel accommodations for which one should pay only the mess charges. We have a medical emergency facility available 24*7.

review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in library, labs are really pioneering for students. Classrooms are mostly smart classrooms with AC and all other amenities along with enough place to accomodate the students. Totally peaceful and knowledgeable environment is present at the campus.

review_summary.college_name: Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Helpful faculty members and better college life.

content.Placements: 60-80% of students are placed in various companies and NGOs every year, with the highest package being 6.5-7 LPA offered last year. Top recruiting companies like Syngenta, Bayer, Godrej Agrovet, UK Crops, and Indorama PVT. Ltd hire students every year.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like smart classrooms with A/c and projectors, and Wi-Fi in the classrooms are always available with high-speed data networks. There is a very unique system for the accommodation of students in a hostel like separate rooms for 3 students. The mess and canteen facilities are available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the language problems.

content.Placements: In BCKV, placements after completing a B.Sc is not so good. Very few students got placed in private banks like IDBI Bank. If students are selecting BCKV because of placements, then do not choose this college. According to the NIRF 2024 report 2024, 83 UG students and 37 PG students got placements with a package ranging from 4.76-6.74 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: In the library, Wi-Fi is available. It is one of the largest agricultural libraries in eastern India. The hostel infrastructure is poor, but 2 to 3 students live in a single room. There is an almirah, cupboard, etc. We have to manage all these by ourselves. The college was established in 1974, so according to it we cannot expect too good about the hostel. Otherwise, it is quite good for living and it is not a big issue.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an above average college having a great campus life, but no placements.

content.Placements: No placements are offered by our University, but after completing the degree, the students can appear for several job related exams like AFO, NABARD or may continue their higher studies. No internships are provided by our university, students can appear for other internships offered by other institutions on their own. The university will not provide any help regarding the same.
content.Infrastructure: We have a huge library with Wi-Fi facilities and all kinds of practical labs, but the size of the practical lab is too small to accommodate all the students. There is a shortage of classrooms, there are no specific classrooms for specific courses. University has all kinds of hostel accommodations for which one should pay only the mess charges. We have a medical emergency facility available 24*7.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This university provides better education and safe environment.

content.Placements: Currently a little less after covid pandemic, but various scope are opening day by day. Different fungicide, pesticide and fertilizer companies are approaching the campus and NGOs are also associated with this placement process. Hope for a better future.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in library, labs are really pioneering for students. Classrooms are mostly smart classrooms with AC and all other amenities along with enough place to accomodate the students. Totally peaceful and knowledgeable environment is present at the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied for higher education.

content.Placements: 10%students got placement and rest have amazing ranks in exams. The highest package is 10 lakh per annum and the lowest is 7 LPA. Syngenta Banks, IFFCO, etc. are the top recruiters. Top roles offered are Agriculture Minister and directors of several institutions. This course opens up the gate to several exams like candidates can opt for govt. jobs like UPSC, WBCS and bank jobs.
content.Infrastructure: There is not enough accommodation. Food is average. A canteen is there and medical facilities available. A gym is there. Classrooms are smart classrooms with ACs. It has the second largest library in Asia among all the agricultural universities. Wi-Fi is there in the library but in other areas, network connectivity is poor.

The hostel infrastructure is poor, but 2 to 3 students live in a single room. There is an almirah, cupboard, etc. We have to manage all these by ourselves. The college was established in 1974, so according to it we cannot expect too good about the hostel. Otherwise, it is quite good for living and it is not a big issue.

reviews.review_heading: It is an above average college having a great campus life, but no placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge library with Wi-Fi facilities and all kinds of practical labs, but the size of the practical lab is too small to accommodate all the students. There is a shortage of classrooms, there are no specific classrooms for specific courses. University has all kinds of hostel accommodations for which one should pay only the mess charges. We have a medical emergency facility available 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: This university provides better education and safe environment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is present in library, labs are really pioneering for students. Classrooms are mostly smart classrooms with AC and all other amenities along with enough place to accomodate the students. Totally peaceful and knowledgeable environment is present at the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied for higher education.
reviews.review_text: There is not enough accommodation. Food is average. A canteen is there and medical facilities available. A gym is there. Classrooms are smart classrooms with ACs. It has the second largest library in Asia among all the agricultural universities. Wi-Fi is there in the library but in other areas, network connectivity is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has beautiful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The course is very good. Classrooms are smart and fully air-conditioned. The library is fully loaded with knowledgeable books. It provides free Wi-Fi. The hostel has very good facilities. The mess provides diverse menu twice a day. We have our medical center.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BCKV - Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Two sub-campuses have new academic and administrative buildings. Hostel is very good. I would like to rate it 10 out of 10. The food quality is perfect.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Bankura (Susunia)
reviews.review_heading: College with good faculty and good future.
reviews.review_text: Our agriculture department is divided into several department some of them are Ag engineering, Agronomy, Entomology, Horticulture etc. Each department has its lab facility and classrooms separately. The free Wi-Fi facility is only for teachers and office stuff. Mess and canteen has several foods with best quality. Mess's menu is depends on mess managers decision. Medical facilites are moderate. Many outer games are played just like our college team play with local teams some friendly matches.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average in this college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories and classrooms are better. There is a decent library in this college. The food served in the mess is very good. Canteen is average. Medical facilities are available. Sports are conducted such as cricket and football. We also have a gym facility in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a self-sufficient hostel. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Sports are conducted. We also have a gym facility in this college. Aqua guard and cooler are available in our hostel. It also provides unlimited water flow and effective electricity. Laboratories are well-equipped. Many canteens are available. Library has free Wi-Fi. Several old and new books are available in the library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Bankura (Susunia)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with an affordable fee structure.
reviews.review_text: It has 3 big buildings that include an academic building, a boys' hostel, and a girls' hostel. Classrooms are spacious. Projectors, whiteboards, and wooden chairs are available in our classrooms. Library is small but can fulfill our requirements efficiently. Laboratories are well-equipped with autoclaves, PCR, etc. Free Wi-Fi facility is available only for teachers and academic purposes. The hostel room is spacious. In each hostel room, two students can accommodate easily. It provides a personal...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Bankura (Susunia)
reviews.review_heading: It is an opportunity for students to grab the course in an affordable price.
reviews.review_text: Our new campus is big. There are 3 buildings, 1 academic and two hostels. In the academic building, there are 4 classrooms, 1 conference room, laboratories for teachers, and an office room. Free Wi-Fi facility is available only for faculty members. Laboratories are well-equipped and maintained by adhering teachers. Our hostel room is spacious. In each hostel room, 3 students can accommodate easily. Each student has a personal table, chair, and almirah. Washroom provides water facility 24X7. The ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Bankura (Susunia)
reviews.review_heading: Choosing agriculture as a career is a good decision.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available in academic buildings. The library is not very big, but it is full of course-related books and magazines. Our hostel is new. It is in good condition. The mess is quite big. Around 70 students can have dinner or lunch at a time. The canteen is beside the mess. It has a variety of food items and drinks. Indoor and outdoor game facilities are available. From TT to volleyball, we can play what we want.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Bankura (Susunia)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and a good hostel.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has the necessary infrastructure. It has attached bathrooms, a common room, a dining hall, a playground, etc. The rooms are very clean and tidy. It has an attached balcony. It has a good canteen for hostellers. It provides facilities to play cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, table tennis, carrom, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya - Burdwan CampusReviewed on 25 Mar 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college had good placement in 2020.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. Our college has well-developed digital classrooms. Free Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms. It has a well-recognised central library and good labs. The food served in the hostel is moderate. Our college has 24X7 medical services. An ambulance service is available in our college throughout the day.

college_info.college_name: Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya

data.description: Bidhan Chandra Krishi Viswavidyalaya has a state-of-the-art infrastructure, which includes all the necessary facilities. The campus includes well-maintained classrooms, a vast library (claimed to be the largest university library in Asia), and numerous laboratories. The university also maintains a large farm with diverse germplasm, including various flower crops, shrubs, trees, and research facilities like polyhouses. Students benefit from well-established teaching farms and propagation areas for different types of plants.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: To be honest, I'm blessed to study here, it turned my career and makes my flow much better.

review_content.Placements: During our placement time, almost 70% students got placed in top MNc's. I am holding 3 placement offers in my hand. The top companies we got are Infosys, Accenture, the happiest Minds, Aurus Inc, ServiceNow, etc. Roles like ML engineer, data engineer, and Java developer were offered, and the best packages are 20 LPA, and the lowest range was 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has high-class infrastructure, high-end specifications systems for labs and Wi-Fi for students, teachers, and guests separately. The college library contains almost every book, and students have access to the library anytime to upskill themselves. Talking about the college canteen and hostel food, it was good to have.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good maintenance, great faculty, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of the students from my course have been placed from last year. They didn't let us know about the package because there is a training period, and based on student training and experience, the package will be decided. Only start-up companies in the local area, like transformed manufacturing units, etc. Every student got non-paid internships, i.e., 100% students, and the internship is in high-tech automation in Vijayawada. Roles offered are technician and a fresher electrical engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The basic facilities like water and washrooms are pretty fine, but coming to the library and other facilities, it's average because you can't find the books you exactly need in the library. The food in the canteen is of average taste with below-average quantity, and the medical facilities are good. Coming to sports and games, regular activities are done.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students got placed from our course. Infosys, Campus Hire, Tata, and Aurus Pay are recruiting companies. Specials programmerL3 (Trainee), Specials programmerL2 (Trainee), Specials programmerL1 (Trainee), Digital Specials Engineer (Trainee) are roles offered. The highest package is 21 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 10 LPA. 50 percent of students got internships from our course in Infosys, Sotiotech, and Aurus Pay.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good Wi-Fi network in our college, especially in our labs. Coming to infrastructure, we have a big library in college, and we have course-related subject textbooks, and not only about course-related but also story books, newspapers, and all branches related subject textbooks available in our library. Not only books, but we also have computers, which we call the Digital Library. Last but not least, the classrooms have a projector, and maintenance is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's okay if you are near or local to college, else try to skip this.

content.Placements: The placements are good at the college. At our time, we used to get the most highly noted companies. The placement cell is too good at bringing companies according to the skillset of the students and their interests. The packages range between 4 LPA-10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is top-notch. Here, each was well defined, and high technology is used to keep us at the top in this fast-paced life. The Wi-Fi, classrooms, and labs are good and best to use. Talking about the hostel, the food is okay to have.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: To be honest, I'm blessed to study here, it turned my career and makes my flow much better.

content.Placements: During our placement time, almost 70% students got placed in top MNc's. I am holding 3 placement offers in my hand. The top companies we got are Infosys, Accenture, the happiest Minds, Aurus Inc, ServiceNow, etc. Roles like ML engineer, data engineer, and Java developer were offered, and the best packages are 20 LPA, and the lowest range was 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has high-class infrastructure, high-end specifications systems for labs and Wi-Fi for students, teachers, and guests separately. The college library contains almost every book, and students have access to the library anytime to upskill themselves. Talking about the college canteen and hostel food, it was good to have.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good maintenance, great faculty, and facilities.

content.Placements: About 25% of the students from my course have been placed from last year. They didn't let us know about the package because there is a training period, and based on student training and experience, the package will be decided. Only start-up companies in the local area, like transformed manufacturing units, etc. Every student got non-paid internships, i.e., 100% students, and the internship is in high-tech automation in Vijayawada. Roles offered are technician and a fresher electrical engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The basic facilities like water and washrooms are pretty fine, but coming to the library and other facilities, it's average because you can't find the books you exactly need in the library. The food in the canteen is of average taste with below-average quantity, and the medical facilities are good. Coming to sports and games, regular activities are done.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Rules are strict, strict uniforms should be maintained.

content.Placements: Approximately 40% of students from our course were placed, with the highest salary being 13 LPA, an average salary of 4 LPA, and the lowest salary at 2 LPA. Wipro Technologies recruited the most students from our college, followed by two members from Microsoft and three from Infosys. However, internship opportunities are relatively low at our college, particularly for front-end development positions.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are there in our college. Quality of food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available, sports and games are also available. There are also branch matches in our college, and prices will be allotted to the winners.

faqs.question: How can I get into Dhanekula Inst Of Engineering Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Dhanekula Inst Of Engineering Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.

college_info.intro:
University of Technology Jaipur popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Publicis Sapient, Accenture, Tarang Security, and others. BTech students can become Engineers, Data Scientists, Artificial Intelligence (AI) Engineers, or can go for various other job profiles. The university conducts guest lectures for the BTech and MBA students. These course students are taught by expert faculty members who are PhD, diploma, and degree holders. BTech and MBA students can enjoy various facilities such as hostel, library, transport facilities, and others.
For more information about University of Technology Jaipur courses check out the below video:

review_summary.college_name: University of Technology Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Over College University of Technology is the best college and University.

content.Placements: Students from the course were placed in the latest placement drive. Top Recruiting Companies were TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Amazon, Deloitte, IBM, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has spacious, well ventilated Laboratories. High speed Wi-Fi was available. A central library with a large collection of textbooks, reference books, and journals online/offline. Hostels have adequate facilities with shared/separate rooms depending on the type. Basic amenities like study tables, fans, and cupboards were provided. Regular cleaning and maintenance, though comfort may vary depending on occupancy. The mess provides a fixed menu with nutritious meals. On Campus Health facilities were available. Facilities for indoor and outdoor games, such as cricket.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the education and facilities.

content.Placements: In my course, 90% of students were placed. The average package offered is between 3-6 LPA. Banks, accounting firms, and other companies are top recruiters. About 80% of students got internships from B.Com. Big 4s also offer jobs for B.Com graduates like Deloitte, KPMG, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities available for B.Com students, like well-maintained libraries, well-maintained classrooms, etc. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good quality. Also, we have good medical facilities for B.Com students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: UOT Jaipur offers a spacious campus with supportive faculty and decent facilities.

content.Placements: This college has an average placement of 60 to 70 percent. This college offers approximately a package of 3 LPA to 4 LPA, and the highest package can range from 10 LPA to 15 LPA, while the lowest package is around 2.5 Lacs. The campus is mainly visited by companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Reliance, and L&T for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and well-equipped laboratories. There are large grounds and sports complexes for the students to play sports like cricket, football, and basketball. Students here have access to AC and non-AC rooms to choose from.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My university campus tour.

content.Placements: The university provides campus placement to students according to their skills with different packages, and there are many companies that come for placements on campus. Approximately 70% of students accept campus placement offers, with an average package of 1,200,000.
content.Infrastructure: The university offers good campus facilities, and there are well-educated and experienced teachers according to the course. There is also hostel accommodation available with good quality food in the mess and canteen, along with other necessary facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students were placed in our course. The average salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Many startups visit our college to hire students. Agrostar, Agprop, TCS, John Deere, etc., are the top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus environment was very good. All facilities like Wi-Fi, the laboratory, and RO were available. The food served in the mess was good. Attached washrooms were available in the hostel. All facilities were available at our college. Warden was very good. All sports equipment was available. Basketball and football courts were available. A cricket ground was also provided.

admission_overview.college_name: University of Technology Jaipur Admission 2025: Fee, Application, Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: University of Technology Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: University of Technology Jaipur admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses. UOT offers over 60 UG, PG, and doctoral courses through six schools/ departments. Apart from the degree courses,UOT Jaipuralso offers several diploma courses. The mode of application at the university is online or offline for all courses.

University of Technology offers courses in multiple streams such as Management, Law, Science, Arts etc. The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Aspirants can fill out the form online or download the same to apply for the preferred course. Candidates can check below the keyUOT admissionhighlights:
Particulars
UOT Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to the UOT programmes is both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to meet the eligibility requirements specified for their preferred course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below is the eligibility and selection criteria for the topUOT Jaipur courses:
Note:In the absence of information, I have taken the selection criteria from unofficial sources. Hence, data might vary.

University of Technology Jaipur admission criteriamay vary from course to course. Aspirants should check the course-specific eligibility requirements before filling out the application form. Admission to the offered courses is based on qualifying exam or entrance exam scores. Each of the stages of the admission process is explained below:
STEP 1: UOT Jaipur Application Process 2025

The eligible students can visit the official website (https://www.universityoftechnology.edu.in/) to register and fill out the admission form. Aspirants are required to pay an application fee to register for a course at UOT.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students

After the conclusion of the application process, candidates are shortlisted either based on merit in the last qualifying examination or the accepted entrance exam. For Professional/ Technical Courses, aspirants need to pass an entrance test and would be selected for the course only if they fulfil the merit requirements.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the candidates are informed about their selection, they need to come for document verification. Selected candidates can further visit the university campus to pay theUOT Jaipur fee.

courses_data.description: University of Technology offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech in various specialisations such as Mechanical,Electrical, Civil andComputer Science Engineering. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to the BTech course. Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics/ Chemistry/ Mathematics/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ IT/ Biology/ Information Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational Subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category candidates) in the three subjects taken together to apply for BTech programme.

The institute was founded in 1993 and offered undergraduate and postgraduate programs to aspiring engineers in all fields.The college has highly experienced faculties, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and an ardent focus on research and innovation. reviews.review_heading: Good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in the college. Classrooms are cleaned every day by non-teaching staff of the college. There is Wi-Fi in the college as there is a network jammer in the college. We can use Wi-Fi for any download or anything. The library is clean. There is a reading room also.

reviews.review_heading: The reality of MS bidve engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average, the college building area and class room are very crowded. The college provides Wi-Fi with no routers, and the hostel is poor. As for the college mess, it is good and the library is average but not very good. Medical facilities are not provided, the college canteen is average, and sports and games are very few.

reviews.review_heading: 2015 student placement situation was tough, but more companies join college placements in future.
reviews.review_text: The hotel boasts a spacious and immaculate environment, with the added convenience of Wi-Fi access in the hostel. The college offers a vast library for students, although medical facilities are unfortunately not provided. However, the college actively organizes various games and events, and also provides sports-related materials. On the downside, the quality of food in the mess leaves much to be desired.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M S Bidve Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The food served in the mess is good. Labs are clean. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The canteen is good. The food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Hostels are good. Wi-Fi is also available with unlimited data. Laboratory is better. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There are hostels for girls and boys. All facilities, including Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms, are good. Sports games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Not good Placements, but good for just taking an Engineering Degree.
reviews.review_text: Well, the college infrastructure is pretty decent. Not much worse and not much modern. Classrooms are good, with every lab but all are old equipment not used in industry. Hostels are available for students very few students use them because most of the students are local, and they have their homes in the city. Somehow, the c...

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college in Latur.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides 24X7 Wi-Fi. There are labs for getting practical knowledge. Classrooms have projector facilities for power point presentations. A library is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering in Latur city.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24X7 on campus. It is well maintained with greenery so students enjoy a fresh environment. Labs are available for every practical session. Classrooms have projectors for PowerPoint presentations.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Latur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. Classrooms are good, and the library contains every book which students need. The hostel is good. There is a Wi-Fi facility for students and staff also. Opportunities for sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available here like Wi-Fi, CCTV, computer labs, drawing halls and main and sub-libraries. In the hostel, food is good, and other facilities are provided and maintained. In the surrounding of the college campus, there is a facility of breakfast, canteen, etc. Small shops are also available here for the daily needs of students. The environment is good in all aspects.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and campus. It offers a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are very good. Wi-Fi facility is available at our college. There are garden and library. Different variety of dishes are served for students. Quality of food served in the college canteen and in hostel mess. The college has a huge playground for sports like cricket, kabbadi, volleyball, and kho-kho.

reviews.review_heading: In my college all things are very good but some placement issue. Faculty are also Good.
reviews.review_text: All things are available in college like labs, Standard Classroom, Wi-Fi these facility is free in college. Hostel are good service is provided for student like mess. And all. All Sports and game's give up in the Annual Function and freshars party to first year student this subject college is more active.

reviews.review_heading: The most memorable faculty and campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very old, but the facilities provided are very useful and better. Wi-Fi facility is available with a speed of 3 Mbps without any data limit. Classrooms have a better atmosphere. Every required book is available in the library. Medical facilities are available in an emergency. Every year, sports activities are conducted. The campus has two canteens, one is for boys and the other is for girls. Quality of food is good.

The quality of labs and classroom are better every students used computer on better skill

reviews_list.review_title: Really great course. Highly recommend.

review_content.Placements: Campus placement is very low. You'll have to write a government exam or apply for interviews on your own. But jobs in the public sector and private sector are plenty, so it won't be that hard to get a job if you have decent grades, and there is still placement in companies like Cadbury, Reliance, Tata, etc. It'll be great since it's a very diverse field, and you'll get jobs from pharmaceuticals to food companies. Also, you could do UPSC; many people do that too.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, but hostel infrastructure is only okay-ish. There is Wi-Fi, labs for every department, and a huge library. Well-maintained toilets are there. The UG building for B.Sc. Agriculture is new, and it's all well-kept. Classrooms have projectors, platforms, and podiums, and each class has like 4 or 5 ACs too.

review_summary.college_name: College of Agriculture, Vellayani Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing college. Everyone should definitely join this college.

content.Placements: B.Tech. in Biotechnology is a highly demanded course. There are 50% of students are placed after taking this course. The minimum salary of a biotechnology engineer is 10 LPA. Top companies are Pfizer, GlaxoSmithKline, etc. It provides skills development. Students develop practical knowledge, critical thinking, quantitative aptitude, and conceptual skills.
content.Infrastructure: Our course mainly focuses on agriculture biotechnology. So agriculture-based infrastructure is high. It provides Wi-Fi, a library, different types of laboratories, and facilitated classrooms. The hostel is good. It provides a mess and canteen at food affordable rates.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2025) -B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Unlock opportunities for agriculture through KAU.

content.Placements: I am in my final year (2021 batch). The percentage of placements is nearly 10%. Mostly placements are for B.Tech biotechnology students in the college. For B.Sc. hons agriculture, it is basically more of research oriented. So there won't be any placements like B.Tech programs. But you get opportunities to get into farm officer posts and other companies if your performance is good. If you could clear PSC, UPSC IBPS, and various posts are there for agri graduates.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not really that bad. There are enough facilities for accommodation for both girls and boys. The food is also quite good and mess is run by students themselves. The lab facilities are also good but still, developments are needed as many equipment aren't properly working. There is enough exposure to the field during the course period.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2025) -B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really great course. Highly recommend.

content.Placements: Campus placement is very low. You'll have to write a government exam or apply for interviews on your own. But jobs in the public sector and private sector are plenty, so it won't be that hard to get a job if you have decent grades, and there is still placement in companies like Cadbury, Reliance, Tata, etc. It'll be great since it's a very diverse field, and you'll get jobs from pharmaceuticals to food companies. Also, you could do UPSC; many people do that too.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, but hostel infrastructure is only okay-ish. There is Wi-Fi, labs for every department, and a huge library. Well-maintained toilets are there. The UG building for B.Sc. Agriculture is new, and it's all well-kept. Classrooms have projectors, platforms, and podiums, and each class has like 4 or 5 ACs too.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2025) -B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our course.

content.Placements: Placements are not happening in our college. If they do, only 10–20% of students get benefits. If anyone gets a placement offer, they can only offer a salary package with a range of 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Top roles such as agri officer, agri manager, and soil tester. Our course has a career scope in agri-research stations, banking, professorships, and other fields.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure facilities of our college are developing. Wi-Fi is average. Our labs are good and smart classrooms are available. The library is the best part of this college. Hostel facilities are average. The food in the hostel is of the student's choice. Canteen food is of average quality.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Sep 2025) -B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A place which was gifted by a king for the students to pursue their agricultural future.

content.Placements: Every district has a post of Agriculture Officer which is recruited through Psc and also there is a post of soil survey officer. Many banks comes in the college for recruitment. The college also offers internship opportunities It also offers seminars for examination for CAT exam etc. Most of the students pursue their M.Sc. as there are various subjects in which you can pursue your M.Sc. .
content.Infrastructure: As the main building was the queen's summer palace once the newly build buildings adopted a palace structure. All class and the labs are provided with a smart class. The Library is provided with WI-FI. The college has a very good and large ground with an indoor stadium. Training for basketball, badminton, table tennis is provided in the indoor stadium. The indoor stadium is provided with a Jim too. The college also has good labs and processing units with adequate facilities. The college has large instructional farmers and orchards wherein students get trained. It also has a very good farmhouse where outsiders can buy various seeds and plants. The girls UG hostel has 3 blocks and new blocks are coming up. Each room accommodates 3-4 people with adequate facilities. The washroom is common, about 4-5 bathrooms and 4-5 toilets in each floor. Each floor is provided with a water filter. The facilities are good and limited as it is a government college. Mess has definite menu and changes from semester to semester.

The UG building for B.Sc. Agriculture is new, and it's all well-kept. Classrooms have projectors, platforms, and podiums, and each class has like 4 or 5 ACs too.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facilities of our college are developing. Wi-Fi is average. Our labs are good and smart classrooms are available. The library is the best part of this college. Hostel facilities are average. The food in the hostel is of the student's choice. Canteen food is of average quality.

reviews.review_heading: A place which was gifted by a king for the students to pursue their agricultural future.
reviews.review_text: As the main building was the queen's summer palace once the newly build buildings adopted a palace structure. All class and the labs are provided with a smart class. The Library is provided with WI-FI. The college has a very good and large ground with an indoor stadium. Training for basketball, badminton, table tennis is provided in the indoor stadium. The indoor stadium is provided with a Jim too. The college also has good labs and processing units with adequate facilities. The college has larg...

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied with everything.
reviews.review_text: Our department has advanced technologies and machinery for research activities and the demonstration for students. The laboratory for every department is handled by professors directly with a complete range of collection of research materials. There is a library inside our campus which has all collections of books related to every department, and also they provide free Wi-Fi facilities for students. The classrooms were rebuilt recently with well-developed audio-visual aids. Accommodation facilit...

reviews.review_heading: Introducing my college, CoA Vellayani.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are amazing. As mentioned above, the Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are fantastic. Our lab is very interesting because the course requires research. Our hostel is also good, with very good quality food. The mess and canteen provide tasty snacks. The college is excellent in both sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is nice in all aspects, and many students got placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available here. The hostel is good. Wi-Fi is available. An indoor stadium is available. A gym is also available for fitness. The mess is available in the hostel. The food quality is good. A primary health centre is there on campus. Sports facilities are superb.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Jain College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, and every new student can take advantage of its good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are great. Top companies like Accenture, Wipro, and Mu Sigma have come to our college. Almost all students get placed from our college. About 90% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. We have good classrooms, labs, offices, etc. We have a huge library in our college where all types of books are available. Every student can go to the library and do their work or read books. The computer lab is good, with good computers and lab assistants.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jain College of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: About 40-50 students were placed from all branches, especially from CS. Other branches had fewer offers compared to them. Companies like Infosys, TCS, and Wipro approached our college. The salary package offered was 2 LPA to 4 LPA. Internships are rare. Mostly, less famous companies approach this college but you can do internships off campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The college was built in 2014-15 but the walls are cracked and there is water leakage in classrooms. The building has three floors but only one water purifier is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly satisfied with all the facilities, infrastructure, and placements.

review_content.Placements: College has achieved a placement rate of 85% with both internal and external college interviews and sources. Other course graduates have a placement rate of 80%. The highest salary package is 6 LPA and the lowest salary package is 4 LPA. Wipro, Infosys, Mindtree, Chegg, Pinclick, Capgemini, Accenture, Emphasis, HCL, TCS, L&T, DXC Technologies offer placements. We have a dedicated placement officer who ensures all students get placed and internships with the help of industry links and experience. College offers on-campus interviews for all students in their final year in local startups and companies like TCS, Infosys, etc. It gives students industry experience. Top roles offered are a front-end app developer, back-end app developer, back-end website manager, tech and IT consultant, lead project manager, computer maintenance engineer, IT administrator, ethical hacker, cybersecurity consultant, front-end website developer, customer support executive, and many other positions.

individual_reviews.title: So, finally to say, here you can find all-in-one box: knowledge and fun.

content.Placements: We can see placements happening every year in our college and also we are trained for placement from very good people. The max is 4.5 Lakh per annum, and the min is 3 Lakh per annum. We can see many companies visiting for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. We have enough space for the library and for labs, and lab equipment. Also, there are some machines related to civil engineering. Sufficient computers are available, and different labs for different subjects have been allotted as well.

description: Jain College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Jain College of Engineering and Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 18370 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 28942 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Jain College of Engineering and Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 18370 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 21030.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

Jain College of Engineering and Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning has the lowest cutoff rank of 56813 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 61567, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Jain College of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering stood at 89005 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 108783. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) has been rated 3.2 on placements on the basis of 49 reviews done by students.
faqs.question: Does City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer:
A:    City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates).
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed Diploma are not eligible to take the Entrance Test as there are no lateral entry admissions.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.

faqs.question: How can I get into City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidates must have passed Bachelor's degree of minimum of 3 years duration examination or equivalent and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates).
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed Diploma are not eligible to take the Entrance Test as there are no lateral entry admissions.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates must have valid GATE score.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2020, and college has a nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure at our college is excellent. The labs, classrooms, and library are very neat and give off good vibes to study in. 
Unfortunately, there is no hostel facility at our college. Medical sports and games facilities are excellent. 
All types of indoor and outdoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is useful but not much as the signal range is not much strong. The library is outdated. Canteen is average, so I suggest you bring your lunchbox for a healthy lunch.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well organized as we have two blocks namely the admission block and the CS block. We have the mechanical and electrical and communication in the admission block. We have computer Science and civil engineering in the CS block. We have good Wi-Fi in the library.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the infrastructure, facilities, and staff members are good.
reviews.review_text: We didn't have the facilities of a hostel, so we had to stay in a PG in the surrounding area. Our campus was small and quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good with very good environment and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college had well-equipped labs. The library helped students to learn more practically and theoretically to gain more knowledge in every subject.

reviews.review_heading: Review of City Engineering College (CEC, Banglore).
reviews.review_text: The college needs better infrastructure as it lacks proper canteen, labs, and there is no Wi-Fi. The classrooms are average, but there are no hostel facilities. The college won't even care about the health of students as the canteen provides unhygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with their approach to engineering life and career.
reviews.review_text: I am not satisfied with the facilities they are providing like Wi-Fi, canteen, sports, cleaning, laboratories, classrooms, playground, library, etc. There is no hostel in our college, and the infrastructure is not good. The environment of this college is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty and minimal infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: No hostel facilities available. Library was well infrastructure with sufficient number of copies for all the books required. And labs and classroom were not upto the expectations but were bearable. No Wi-Fi and other facilities provided for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the worst. Dissatisfied because of the placements in 2013.
reviews.review_text: The labs are good, and the college is okay. The restrooms in unit 1 are the worst. The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facility. The library was good, and the sports facilities are poor. The college doesn't even provide any hostel facility. Overall, I had the worst experience at this college.

highlights.summary:
GADVASU Ludhiana admissions 2025-26 are now open for various UG, PG, and Diploma courses! Students can visit the official website of the university to learn more and apply.

NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, GADVASU ranks #24 under the category 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors'.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

college_info.intro:
A vast plethora of Animal/Agricultural science courses are available to students at GADVASU. Popular courses are offered by the 6 constituent colleges functioning under Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Science University. Students often seek for programs like the 5.5-year BVSc & AH, 4-year BFSc, and the 4-year BTech programs. MVSc, MTech, and MSc Agriculture are the popular postgraduate courses of the university. Moreover, many specialisations are offered with these courses.
Interested students can know more about the popular programs at GADVASU in the details provided below:

placements.overview: GADVASU has put in place a state-of-the-art placement ecosystem which is known to equip students & also enable the students to achieve their career aspirations. The university has put a comprehensive Training & Placements Cell that prepares the students through events like pre-placement trainings, workshops, seminars, industrial visits, etc. The key highlights of GADVASU placements 2022 are presented below:

This package was offered by Robbins India to a B.Tech (ME) student named Kamlesh Singh. The average salary package offered during the placement drive at GADVASU is INR 2-3 Lakhs. faqs.question: How costly is GADVASU?

faqs.answer: A:    GADVASU is one of the most prestigious universities in India and offers excellent opportunities for UG and PG students. A candidate can check the GADVASU cutoff for 2023 on the GADVASU official website. Moreover, the 2023-24 cutoffs for General, OBC/SC/ST categories are 715-117 and 116-93 respectively. Also, the NEET cutoffs for general and reserved categories are 720-137 and 136-107 respectively. Only NEET (UG) exam scores are accepted by GADVASU for admission. A candidate must secure equal to or more than the NEET cutoff.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by GADVASU for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (GADVASU) in Ludhiana accepts the ICAR AIEEA entrance exam score for admission to the following courses: M.TechM.V.Sc.M.F.Sc.M.Sc.The minimum eligibility qualification for admission to Master's programs is: OCPA/OGPA of 6.00/10.0060% marks in aggregate
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does GADVASU accept for admission to M.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes GUDVASU accept ICAR and AIEEA score .The eligibility for this score is 10+2 . The courses accept this score areB.E/B.TechM.E/M.TechMVSCB.F.ScM.ScM.F.Sc. and many moreThe tutions fees for this courses are from 75.2k to 1.4 L. Students can score in this exams and can get the cutoof so they can be placed in the college. This score provides 50% eligibility of placing in the college. M.Tech course provides 60% eligibility.
faqs.question: Does GADVASU accept ICAR AIEEA score?

reviews_list.review_title: Veterinary Polytechnic College is the best.

review_content.Placements: At the time of admission in our batch, there was an option for both medical and non-medical students who score 60 % or more. The salary package offered mainly depends on us and our hard work in the field. Verka is the top recruiting company and we also have recruitment by government. All the students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: It was an average college because our batch was the 2nd batch of the college. So it was in a developing stage. So mostly there was no well-established infrastructure, but the facilities for all the things like a geyser in the hostel which runs by solar were available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall good. Higher placements .

review_content.Placements: Assistant manager, deputy manager, data analyst, dairy engineer are some of the top roles offered. Can pursue their career in companies such as Amul, Verka, Nestle, Mother Dairy, Cream Bell, Dabur, Colgate, Go, Tru and other companies. Students can also continue to become Dairy Scientist, nowadays a very good career option.
review_content.Infrastructure: A combined ground and sports facilities and hostel facilities with Punjab Agricultural University. Good quality food and drinkable water and other basic hostel facilities available. Availability of Wi-Fi 24*7, availability of water, separate hostel facility for NRI And foreign students. Games such as athletics, swimming hockey etc. are available. Libraries are present in campus .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement. Good work.

review_content.Placements: Amul. NESTLE. VERKA were the top recruiters. Basic salary offered was 35000rs. The top role offered was of General manager. The internship was provided In private companies like verka.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi available in hostel and college both. Good quality food ( nutritious meal), Non veg and veg both food, Playing ground, Tv room, Hostel canteen, Gadvasu premier league organised for students. Campus hospital, Youth festival.

faqs.answer: The application forms for GADVASU admission 2023-2024 were released on September 30, 2023. The last date for PG admission is July 4, 2023. The admission cycle for GADVASU begins in May for all courses. The university offers undergraduate, masters, and Ph.D. programs. Some of the courses offered are: Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.)Master of Science (M.Sc.)Master of Fisheries Science (M.F.Sc.)Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.V.Sc.)To be eligible for undergraduate admission, candidates must have: A minimum qualification of 10+2 or equivalentPhysics, Chemistry, Biology/ Mathematics and English from a recognised Indian Board/UniversityAt least 50% marks in aggregate excluding the optional subject (s)

review_summary.college_name: GADVASU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Mar 24) - Diploma in Veterinary Science and Animal Health Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Everything is very good in our college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. Students got placed in veterinary inspector job roles after completion of this course. Top recruiting companies were Virbac, Mankind, and Intas. Students also got offers from international companies. Internships were also offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus was very clean. Canteen was available. It also provided a decent library. All laboratories were available in our college. Pathological and anatomy laboratories were provided. Our campus is situated on the main highway. A farm of Sahiwal cows was available for students for practical work.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. and A.H.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best course to join if you like animals and are passionate about treating them.

content.Placements: Our college provides internships. Internships are compulsory for final-year students. This course is based on the medical field which comprises five and half years of bachelor's degree where we have one year of internship which is compulsory at the end.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good but can be improved. Sports facilities are available in the hostel.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are top-notch. They are Ph.D. holders. We have to study hard on our own.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Mar 24) - Diploma in Veterinary Science and Animal Health Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Veterinary Polytechnic College is the best.

The salary package offered mainly depends on us and our hard work in the field. Verka is the top recruiting company and we also have recruitment by government. All the students got internships.

content.Placements: Amul. NESTLE. VERKA were the top recruiters. Basic salary offered was 35000rs. The top role offered was of General manager. The internship was provided In private companies like verka.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi available in hostel and college both. Good quality food ( nutritious meal), Non veg and veg both food, Playing ground, Tv room, Hostel canteen, Gadvasu premier league organised for students. Campus hospital, Youth festival.
content.Faculty: The teachers were PhD, or had Master degree or Bachelor degree. Smart student interaction was there. Companies visits were organised. Systematically design course. University mela organised every year. Research work, Zoonotic studies, Making of different food products, High tech lab with good safety measure.

admission_overview.college_name: GADVASU Admission 2025: Eligibility, Process, Fee & Dates

admission_process.title: Guru Angad Dev Veterinary And Animal Sciences University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Established in 2005, Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (GADVASU) is a state-level university located in Ludhiana. The University is entirely dedicated to the field of Animal Sciences and is a part of Panjab University. GADVASU offers eight courses in multiple specialisations at UG, PG and doctoral level.
GADVASU admission cycle commences in May for all its courses. A brief overview of the selection process for GADVASU courses is listed below:
lists: Selection of candidates to all the UG courses is based on the CET GADVASU score, conducted by the University
Admission to GADVASU PG programme is based on the performance of a candidate inAIEEA-PG, conducted by ICAR, New Delhi
For GADVASU PhD programme, candidates are selected based on aggregate obtained by a candidate in master's degree followed by a university-level interview round
For more information about GADVASU check out the below videos:

faqs.question: Does GADVASU accept ICAR AIEEA score?
faqs.answer: Yes GUDVASU accept ICAR and AIEEA score .The eligibility for this score is 10+2 . The courses accept this score areB.E/B.TechM.E/M.TechMVSCB.F.ScM.ScM.F.Sc. and many moreThe tutions fees for this courses are from 75.2k to 1.4 L. Students can score in this exams and can get the cutoof so they can be placed in the college. This score provides 50% eligibility of placing in the college. M.Tech course provides 60% eligibility.

faqs.question: When are GADVASU application forms out?
faqs.answer: The application forms for GADVASU admission 2023-2024 were released on September 30,  2023. The last date for PG admission is July 4,  2023.The admission cycle for GADVASU begins in May for all courses. The university offers undergraduate, masters, and Ph.D. programs. Some of the courses offered are:Master of Veterinary Science (M.V.Sc.)Master of Science (M.Sc.)Master of Fisheries Science (M.F.Sc.)Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.V.Sc.)To be eligible for undergraduate admission, candidates must have:A minimum qualification of 10+2 or equivalentPhysics, Chemistry, Biology/ Mathematics and English from a recognised Indian Board/UniversityAt least 50% marks in aggregate excluding the optional subject (s)

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at GADVASU?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for B.Tech at GADVASU are 89. Total 89 seats are offered.                                                                                                       B.Tech in dairy technology - 57 seats B.Tech in biotechnology - 32 seatsThe exams accepted in this course are ICAR, AIEEA. GADVASU has some quotas:                                                                                   Additional seats for sports quotaAdditional seats for the migrantsAdditional seats for NRI/ foriegn candidatesSeats for residents in punjab state and many more

faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by GADVASU?
faqs.answer: Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University provides a vast variety of courses in the veterinary and animal husbandry realms. Students can seek admissions at the university through both entrance test and merit basis. Admissions for the Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (BVSc & AH) programme are held on the basis of theNational Eligibility and Entrance Test (NEET). Admissions for various other programs are held on the basis of merit obtained inHigher Secondary.

placement_data.title: GADVASU Placement overview
paragraphs: What’s new at GADVASU placements 2024? As per the overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.54 LPA and INR 5.71 LPA , respectively. In addition, the median package offered during PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4.2 LPA . Earlier, according to GADVASU NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during GADVASU UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.85 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during GADVASU PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.25 LPA . Apart from this, placement rate recorded during GADVASU UG 5-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 was 87% and 92%, respectively.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is GADVASU. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #30 under Agriculture and Allied Sectors category. GADVASU excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around GADVASU rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Punjab In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, GADVASU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. GADVASU's rankings in 'University' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, GADVASU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'State Public University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, GADVASU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category have displayed a decreasing trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, GADVASU fell 6 ranks to #30 rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is very good in our college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was very clean. Canteen was available. It also provided a decent library. All laboratories were available in our college. Pathological and anatomy laboratories were provided. Our campus is situated on the main highway. A farm of Sahiwal cows was available for students for practical work.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best course to join if you like animals and are passionate about treating them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but can be improved. Sports facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good. Higher placements .
reviews.review_text: A combined ground and sports facilities and hostel facilities with Punjab Agricultural University. Good quality food and drinkable water and other basic hostel facilities available. Availability of Wi-Fi 24*7, availability of water, separate hostel facility for NRI And foreign students. Games such as athletics, swimming hockey etc. are available. Libraries are present in campus .

reviews.review_heading: Good placement. Good work.

Wi-Fi available in hostel and college both.

Non veg and veg both food, 
Playing ground,

Hostel canteen, 
Gadvasu premier league organised for students.

There is adequate space for sports and ...

So overall the infrastructure is good with all the basic amenities. And playground are lush green. And overall campus and infrastructure is above average according to the Indian standard s.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money. Good infrastructure. Gives good future possibilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The labs are well established according to the disciplines. Practical work is preferred and facilities are provided to improve the students' skills. It is a new college set up in 2008.

reviews.review_heading: Affordability nice, building a bit old, nice campus life, good opportunities .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms contains smart boards and projectors. Teachers sometimes use blackboard and whiteboards also. Laboratories here are very advanced. The hostel food is also decent. We are given one B.Ed study table and chair in each room. Medical allowances are also given. There is swimming pool, athletic ground, cycling vellodrome in my campus.

reviews.review_heading: How getting a prefix doctor feels like.
reviews.review_text: The hostel food and hygiene is acceptable. It cost us around 3000 for the staying part and 3000 for the Mess food per month, which offers you three times the food and 2 times the tea. The hostel life is something I was looking forward to, and this has not disappoint.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it was very good experience in the University the campus and people are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is very good. All class rooms are smart class rooms. The food in hostel is also very good and all facilities such as washing machine, gym , wifi etc. and all the basic requirements are provided to the students. And the staff is very cooperative.

data.description: GADVASU Ludhiana has a rich legacy of knowledgeable and experienced faculty members. The majority of the faculty staff is PhD-holding and possesses vast field experience in their respective disciplines. Dr. Jatinder Paul Singh Gill presides over the post of Vice-Chancellor and convenes the major administrative decisions at the university. Other faculty staff at Guru Angad Dev Veterinary and Animal Sciences University include Dr. Suresh Kumar Sharma as the Registrar.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam Engineering College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam Engineering College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam Engineering College offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MCA. Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Since 2015 good placement packages are given.

review_content.Placements: 96 percent students get placed in companies that provide a package of around INR 15000-20000 per month. TVS, LNT, Infosys, Lakshmi precision tools limited Coimbatore, etc. are the top recruiting companies. I think 20 percent students got internship and industry visits. This college is Naac accredited B grade.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not bad and infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is provided for students projects and educational activity. Library is quite silent and has many books. I am a day scholar student so I don't know about hostel, food in canteen is below average and college also has medical facilities and sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Don't pick this college if you have interest in extra curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Very less number of students got selected in campus. There were not much interviews held. We got only some unknown companies from our core side. 7k-15k max is the salary offered in core. No top recruiting companies came and 5% of the students went for internship in BHEL. HR is the top role offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. We used our lab in an effective way than other colleges. We have neat classrooms and good library and we don't have any Wi-Fi facility. I don't know about the hostel since I'm a day scholar but I have heard that the experience is not so good. Food is average. The canteen’s food is above average. Good medical facilities are present and the college also has good sports facility but we are not allowed to use them.
