review_summary.college_name: Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Placement and the infrastructure are not good.

content.Placements: The campus placement is not good, and the salary package offered is low. More and more companies should be on the campus. Most of the passing-out students do not have a job.
content.Infrastructure: Food is below average. The canteen is not active most of the time. There are no separate buildings for departments. There are not many lab facilities. There are not enough equipment, and if any existing equipment is there, it is not working. More and more buildings are needed for the college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and friendly. It is full of theory-based learning, not industry-based. The students are trained for exams, not for skill-based jobs. They are not trained for jobs. Most of the courses are theory-based, not practical. The practical knowledge of the students is less.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are good. The highest salary package offered was 4.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Vuram Technologies, Webberax, 7th Sense, Vaken Technologies, Max VY, BYD, Utsavgiri Private Limited, Elcompo Private Limited, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good. The infrastructure is decent. Laboratories are very good. Classrooms are well-maintained. There is a decent library in this college. In our classroom, PPT projectors are also available. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are good. Sports are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Since 2015 good placement packages are given.

content.Placements: 96 percent students get placed in companies that provide a package of around INR 15000-20000 per month. TVS, LNT, Infosys, Lakshmi precision tools limited Coimbatore, etc. are the top recruiting companies. I think 20 percent students got internship and industry visits. This college is Naac accredited B grade.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not bad and infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is provided for students projects and educational activity. Library is quite silent and has many books. I am a day scholar student so I don't know about hostel, food in canteen is below average and college also has medical facilities and sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Don't pick this college if you have interest in extra curricular activities.

content.Placements: Very less number of students got selected in campus. There were not much interviews held. We got only some unknown companies from our core side. 7k-15k max is the salary offered in core. No top recruiting companies came and 5% of the students went for internship in BHEL. HR is the top role offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. We used our lab in an effective way than other colleges. We have neat classrooms and good library and we don't have any Wi-Fi facility. I don't know about the hostel since I'm a day scholar but I have heard that the experience is not so good. Food is average. The canteen’s food is above average. Good medical facilities are present and the college also has good sports facility but we are not allowed to use them.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I will work in a company that will be provided by our college placements.

content.Placements: In our college 1/3rd of the students were placed in a top companies remains were placed in a production company with less basic pay. Our college's top recruiting companies were Vuram Technology, IBM, Infosys, NCR corporation limited, and Shanmugam Groups from Vellore.
content.Infrastructure: Our college with full of CCTV surveillance so there was no ragging and treads from other students, and a Wi-Fi setup was available at all times. All places in our college for final year students who studying in Anjalai Ammal Mahalingam college and hostel food was average.

reviews.review_heading: Inspite of being in a rural area, the college provided good facilities and placements.

One was in our department floor another on the first floor. Fo Wi-Fi students have to register their  IP address to lab technicians, and it was of average speed.  In the hostel, rooms were good to stay, and the quality of food served was average. We had a separate canteen for boys and girls, and the food served was average. Medical fa...

reviews.review_heading: Correct place to understand the practical knowledge and good infrastructure, clean surroundings.
reviews.review_text: 1. I am very proud to say, in our college, they have good infrastructure and a clean environment and natural surroundings. The biggest college library in the Thanjavur surroundings and we have more than three laboratories namely cad/cam lab and thermal lab, production lab, mechatronics lab, meteorology lab. Each lab has air conditioning except the manufacturing lab and students got the Wi-Fi facilities with the help of entering their id number for searching related to their project and clearing ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good environment. Only dissappointed is placements.

Each classrooms are monitoring with webcam and library is good. They provide gym, sports facilities. Medical facilities is need to be improve.

reviews.review_heading: A good college, but needs to focus on the placement of the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is just better. The facilitated labs for all departments which gives some knowledge but it is not fully equipped, for taking some test related to our core, we need to go to other big universities. Classrooms are 24/7 under the surveillance of cameras. The library is good. Encouraging the sports and good play courts are there, and also some are under construction. Free Wi-Fi is provided for the final year students. Food available is average.

review_content.Placements: This college placement is excellent. Many students study in our college and in many branches. The college is the best in Gujarat at Ahmedaba, and the college placement is very good. Many companies are coming to this university and offering many students job internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom is very good and very clean, and is attached to AC. This college is the best for all branche, classrooms are very peaceful, and it is a great college. This college has many activities such as dance all sports yoga singing etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: PG in Cyber Security Application & Risk Management - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Strong cybersecurity program with good infrastructure and scope for more industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students from our course get placed through campus or with university support. Placements are provided to students. The package is from 5 to 20 LPA. It is a nice college. This interesting program provides in-depth knowledge and hands-on training in IT.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, computer labs, a big hall, and parking facilities, are available. The college has a good environment. It is a nice college and good for studying. Labs are well-equipped, and all facilities are available for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: PG in Cyber Security Application & Risk Management - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Well-structured program with strong faculty and good placement support in cybersecurity.

review_content.Placements: I am part of the 2022–2024 PG batch in Cybersecurity and Risk Management. Around 70–75 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 13 LPA the lowest is around 3.5 LPA and the average stands at 6 LPA. Companies like Deloitte TCS Capgemini and PwC visit our campus. Around 65 percent of students secure internships in firms such as Infosys Accenture and HDFC's cybersecurity wing. Top roles offered include Cybersecurity Analyst SOC Analyst and Risk Compliance Associate. Placement support and resume guidance are helpful.

answer.text: Based on your skills and relevant experience in the industry, as an MSc IT postgraduate, you can become a Machine Learning Architect, IoT Solutions Architect, Cloud Engineer, Data Scientist, or Big Data Engineer. These are some of the top-paying job profiles nowadays in the IT sector, offering an average salary package of INR 15 LPA in India.

faqs.question: Which is the highest paying job for MSc IT postgraduates?

answer.text: Both are popular job roles, as per the World Economic Forum report. The key differences between the two are as follows:The Data Analyst collects relevant data from various sources to filter and analyze it. The data scientist gathers sizable amounts of structured and unstructured data while performing data mining.Education: To become a data analyst, you can apply with a Bachelor's degree in math, Statistics or a related field. Data scientists typically pursue a master's Diploma or degree in data Science.Salary: The salary of a data scientist is usually higher than that of a data analyst. According to global estimates, a data scientist can earn around $100,000 per year, whereas a data analyst can earn around $70,000.

lists: The Data Analyst collects relevant data from various sources to filter and analyze it. The data scientist gathers sizable amounts of structured and unstructured data while performing data mining.
Education: To become a data analyst, you can apply with a Bachelor's degree in math, Statistics or a related field. Data scientists typically pursue a master's Diploma or degree in data Science.

Salary: The salary of a data scientist is usually higher than that of a data analyst. According to global estimates, a data scientist can earn around $100,000 per year, whereas a data analyst can earn around $70,000.
faqs.question: What is the difference between a Data Analyst and a Data Scientist?

answer.text: The BTech CSE syllabus is incomplete without regular lab classes and internship programs because of the importance of programming, software development, and AI and ML knowledge required in the CSE field, which cannot be taught only through theory classes.Premier institutes often collaborate with leading industrial partners to provide their students with the best internship exposure and training opportunities, which may act as an entry point to excellent earning opportunities later. individual_reviews.title: There is good support for what you need, like education, campus life, events, parties, etc.

content.Placements: More than 75% of students are placed, and they provide internships in ISRO and IBM. For those who are best in academics, they will help to secure internships. content.Infrastructure: The best infrastructure of classrooms and labs is that they are Wi-Fi-enabled and air-conditioned. There are security guards at the gate of the hostel.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and studies. Overall, everything is good.

content.Placements: Many students get internships as B.Tech students have not yet completed their degree so no one gets placements yet. content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are top-notch so comfortable and attractive. Sports and games are also kept in mind and many clubs and activities are there. Cleanliness is there and a new building is under construction so there are a lot of things like library and many others.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college has the best placement every year.

content.Placements: This college placement is excellent. Many students study in our college and in many branches. The college is the best in Gujarat at Ahmedaba, and the college placement is very good. Many companies are coming to this university and offering many students job internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom is very good and very clean, and is attached to AC. This college is the best for all branche, classrooms are very peaceful, and it is a great college. This college has many activities such as dance all sports yoga singing etc.

individual_reviews.course: PG in Cyber Security Application & Risk Management - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong cybersecurity program with good infrastructure and scope for more industry exposure.

content.Placements: About 80% of students from our course get placed through campus or with university support. Placements are provided to students. The package is from 5 to 20 LPA. It is a nice college. This interesting program provides in-depth knowledge and hands-on training in IT.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, computer labs, a big hall, and parking facilities, are available. The college has a good environment. It is a nice college and good for studying. Labs are well-equipped, and all facilities are available for students.

individual_reviews.course: PG in Cyber Security Application & Risk Management - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured program with strong faculty and good placement support in cybersecurity.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2022–2024 PG batch in Cybersecurity and Risk Management. Around 70–75 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 13 LPA the lowest is around 3.5 LPA and the average stands at 6 LPA. Companies like Deloitte TCS Capgemini and PwC visit our campus. Around 65 percent of students secure internships in firms such as Infosys Accenture and HDFC's cybersecurity wing. Top roles offered include Cybersecurity Analyst SOC Analyst and Risk Compliance Associate. Placement support and resume guidance are helpful.

college_info.intro:
Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University comprises 8 departments, including Science, Engineering, Humanities, Agriculture, and others. BTech, BSc, BA, and MBA are the flagship courses offered at HGU University.
MAHG University offers a full-time,three-year BSc programme at the UG level. The BSc programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Maths, Chemistry, Physics, Home Science, Environmental Sciences, and others. The MBA programme offered by the MAHGU is a four-year programme. It is offered in several specilisation such as Business Management and Hotel Management.
Below-mentioned are the Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University's popular programmes:

content.Faculty: Our teachers were helpful. Our college organised yoga, football, volleyball, cricket, karate, and many other sports. There were chess and indoor games available. The semester exams were average.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University Admission 2025: Application, Eligibility & Selection Process

admission_process.title: MAHGU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MAHGU admission 2025for UG and PG programmes is both merit and entrance-based.MAHGUoffers admissions in its technical and professional courses based on the score obtained in relevant entrance exams, while admissions in other programmes are done on the merit secured in the qualifying exam. The university offers an extensive range of courses at UG, PG and Diploma levels for students to pursue. MAHGU also conducts its own entrance exams for admission in certain programmes.

MAHGU offers admissions to its UG and PG courses based on national-level entrance exam score. Additionally, the university also offers direct admissions to students belonging to hilly region and rankholders of all central and state boards of India. Although admissions to most courses offered at MAHGU are done on entrance-basis, the university also accepts applicants on academic merit-basis or otherwise as deemed fit to fill the vacant seats. Find below the major highlights forMAHGU admissions:
MAHGU Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
32 (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2024
How to apply
https://hgu.ac.in/
UG courses: INR 20,500 - INR 4 lakh
PG courses: INR 25,500 - INR 1 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma| Certificate
Popular programmes
BA| BSc| MBA| LLM| PG Diploma

MAHGU course admission is subject to preset admission criteria. Admissions to MAHGU are accepted on both an entrance and merit basis. The unviersity offers a wide variety of programmes, such as BA, BSc, LLB, MBA, LLM, etc. Find tabulated below the eligibility and selection details for some of theMAHGU courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

MAHGU feevaries depending on the programme selected by the student. The total tuition fee of the UG, PG, Diploma and Certificate programmes offered at Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University ranges between INR 15,000 and INR 4 L. The table below contains details regarding the total tuition fee of the courses offered at MAHGU:
Course Name
Total Tuition Fees (Investment)
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change

MAHGU reserves31%of total seats for students who are permanent residents of Uttarakhand. Apart from this, the university also reserves seats for those belonging to SC/ST/OBC and PWD (with minimum disability to the extent of 40%). Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University also reserves some of the seats for NRIs, foreign nationals, PIOS. For further details regarding the seat reservation policy of the university, candidates can visit the official website of MAHGU or contact the admissions office of the university.

MAHGU admission process includes several steps. Interested candidates can visit the official website of MAHGU to obtain the application form. The admission process is held in both online and offline methods. The university accepts admissions on the basis of valid score obtained in the entrance exam conducted by the university Those who fulfill the specified eligibility criteria can follow the below-mentioned steps to completeMAHGU admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility ccriteria an visit the official website of MAHGU to fill the application form online. Alternatively, students can also download the prescribed form from the university's official website and after filling it out duly, send it to the Admission Cell of MAHGU, Uttarakhand and Information centers with a payment ofINR 1,000as a demand draft drawn in favour of "Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University" payable at Dehradun. Once the students are admitted to the University, an Anti-Ragging affidavit by students & parents both on stamp paper INR 10 duly attested by the oath commissioner/notary, has to be submitted.
Step 2: Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the entrance exams for the respective courses they chose. Admissions to the MBA programme are done on the basis of valid score obtained in MAT/ CAT while scores obtained in MAHGUEE are considered for admissions to other courses. The university also conducts group discussion followed by a round of personal interview to shortlist the candidates for certain programmes.
Step 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

The shortlisted candidates will then be called in for counselling based on which seats will be allotted. Once the seats have been allotted the students will have to pay the course fee to complete the admission process.

courses_data.name: MAHGU MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University offers a postgraduate degree inMBAto its students. The total duration of the programme is two years and it is divided into four semesters of six months each. To be eligible for theMBA prorgamme offered at MAHGU, students must clear graduation and also obtain a valid score in entrance exams such as MAT, CAT. The university also accepts admissions to the MBA programme on the basis of merit obtained in MAHGUE followed by the group discussion and personal interview conducted by the university.

faqs.question: Can I do MBA at MAHGU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garwhal University offers a two-year postgraduate degree in MBA to students. The university offers the programme across two specialisations. Students can pursue the programme in either MBA general or MBA in Hotel Management. Students with a valid score in entrance exams such asMAT/ CATcan apply for the course. The university also accepts students on merit-basis for its MBA programme in certain cases.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does Himalayan Garhwal University accept for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: In general this university accept scores from common management entrance exams such as CAT (Common Admission Test), MAT (Management Aptitude Test), XAT (Xavier Aptitude Test), GMAT (Graduate Management Admission Test), and CMAT (Common Management Admission Test) for admission to MBA programs. but it can also based on the exam conducted by this university own.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University?
faqs.answer: The fees of MBA is somewhere between 80k - 1 Lacs for Maharaja  Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University. Which contributes 50k in first year and 50k in second year. TCS, Wipro, and Infosys were some of the leading companies that visited the campus during Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University placements. The University has been successfully able to place students in reputed MNCs from different streams such as Information Technology, Pharmaceutical, Manufacturing, ITES, Banking & Finance, Law, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very nice and cool, it's in a hilly mountainous area. Wi-Fi service and labs are also available. Classrooms and the library are here properly, and everything is nearby and clean. Sports activities are organized from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: Make your future safe and secure with Maharaja Agarsen Himalayan Garhwal University, Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The campus is covered with a complete Wi-Fi network and a peaceful library with a neat and clean environment in the classrooms. There are grounds for playing sports like football, tennis, cricket, and more, with guidance from sports teachers who have international-level achievements. So, try this university.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the faculty members. It provided good placements in 2015.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is too good. The university is near the mountains, so the view is also good. The quality of the hostel and food is good. There are many indoor and outdoor sports. The campus is very outstanding and the nature near campus is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharaja Agrasen Himalayan Garhwal University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were big, but chairs and tables were not in good condition. There was no Wi-Fi. There was a library, but I visited it very rarely. A study room was provided where cleanliness was always maintained. The hostel mess and food were bad. The basketball ground was large.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel and classrooms were excellent, neat, and clean. Our college had lush greenery. Every day there was fresh air. Our college had excellent infrastructure. Everything was good.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure in the Himalayas of Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The facilities on the University campus were good. It has a good canteen where we get delicious food, and the sports ground is vast, and medical services are the best. Also, the hostel campus is fully-furnished, and it has air-conditioned rooms. The washrooms are clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and the campus is clean. Classrooms have air-conditioners, and Wi-Fi connection is available for students on the campus. Labs are available for practicals, which are kept clean and maintained. Various apparatus and instruments are available for experiments. Sports and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. The hostel is located in a hill area with very good nature and fresh air. Classrooms, labs, library and Wi-Fi are very good. The hostel is very good. The food served in a mess is the best, and it tastes like homemade food. Sports are very important in university, and it provides opportunities for sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied, and you should take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Labs are well maintained and have all apparatus for experiments. Wi-Fi is also available and has average speed. The mess and canteen are also available. Medical facilities and sports, indoor and outdoor games, are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent place for studying.
reviews.review_text: They had excellent facilities in terms of infrastructure. The role of the administration was really good. It was a hygienic place. Everything in the college was really amazing. If I talk about facilities, they had good and hygienic places where we could have food.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very knowledgeable. It is the best college for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: A total of 500 students were placed in my college. The lowest package offered by my college was 3 LPA and the highest package offered was 20 LPA. Google, Microsoft, Amazon, etc., recruited students. Around 60% of students got internships. Roles offered included HR, manager, and assistant manager. Many different types of companies are recruited on college campuses. It ranges from large tech giants like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon to smaller, specialized businesses. Industries like finance, cons...

reviews.review_heading: There are 100% job placements in this college in the top brands.
reviews.review_text: There were lots of facilities in our college. Like all the major departments, live practical facility which is most valuable things for us. All infrastructure was very good and smooth.

reviews.review_heading: In terms of infrastructure, I'm dissatisfied.
reviews.review_text:
1) Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library are there. There are good teachers to support in every stream. 
2) The quality of food is quite good in hostel. Canteen's food is good and well maintained. Sports and games are not there. Medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, you can take admission, but you will have to learn many things on your own.
reviews.review_text: The library here is good, and Wi-Fi is never a problem. The classrooms are also good. In the hostel, you can eat in the mess or ask for it from outside as per your wish. The hostel rooms are average. The labs here are also the best, but we can say that they are average.

college_info.intro:
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the College of Engineering and Management are very popular among the students. The institute offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of Engineering and Technology. CEMK aims at the holistic development of students and helps them to develop technical competencies as well as various soft skills required to target core-industry roles.
The industry-institute relations established by CEM Kolaghat provide students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. CEMK also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable College of Engineering and Management recruiters include TCG Digital, Bhawans Cybertech, Wipro Tech-NLTH, ARF Design Pvt. Ltd., OpenFive, Debson Pumps Pvt. reviews_list.review_title: Vibrant campus with excellent resources

review_content.Placements: According to the previous year's records 74 percent of students from the 2019-2023 batch were placed, whereas the number increased to 80 percent for the 2020-2024 batch. The highest package for the batch of 2024 pass-outs was 12 LPA while the average package was 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS and Infosys hire from our college, and top roles like system engineer and graduate trainee are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is a Wi-Fi zone for most areas, and laboratories offer high-speed internet. The classrooms are well-designed for a large number of students. The library has many books and a separate study zone with a very nice atmosphere. The classrooms are very airy and always give a vibe of study. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very nice with a water supply 24/7. The sports and games facilities are the best parts offering a number of opportunities for students.

The internship programme is held by Collaborate of Jadavpur University and various online platforms.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of this college are so good. There are many classrooms, 10+ various labs, one Central library and also available a Wi-Fi facility. There is a separate boy and girl hostel facility. Hostel food is of medium quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an amazing engineering college. It has good placements and a food hostel facility.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed in my course this year is 60%. 3-4 MNCs visited the campus and pool campusing was held in which various start-up companies came to the college. Roles like developer, associate, process executive, etc., are offered here.

Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Set Consultant, Aerodec, and Corelynx. Roles offered are software developer, business analyst, social media executive, etc.

The food is bad. Rooms are average but not so good. Medical facilities are good. Sports of different varieties are available here.

admission_process.title: College Of Engineering and Management Kolaghat Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates looking to join theCollege of Engineering & Management, Kolaghat,need to complete a multi-step admission process. The process starts with an admission enquiry followed by application, selection rounds, and admission confirmation. The process mainly commences online. Students interested in enrolling in any of the courses offered at the college can follow the steps explained below to complete theCEM Kolaghat admission process:
Step 1: College of Engineering & Management, Kolaghat Application and Admission Enquiry 2025

Prospective students can visit the official website of the college to fill out the admission enquiry form. The admission help desk of the college will reach out to the students to explain the entire procedure of admission.
Step 2: College of Engineering & Management, Kolaghat Selection Rounds 2025

Students are selected on an entrance basis for both BTech and MTech admission. The college may consider further parameters at the time of shortlisting students. Candidates need to provide the allotment letter downloaded from WBJEE to complete the rest of the process.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to go through the document verification and pay theCEMK feesfor seat confirmation.

description: CEM - College Of Engineering & Management cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to multiple courses. Refer to the sections below to view the CEM - College Of Engineering & Management WBJEE cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds and categories, etc. Other exam-related updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

CEM - College Of Engineering & Management cutoff 2025 was released via WBJEE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 614217 and 1447703 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 614217, B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 614217.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

CEM - College Of Engineering & Management B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with past two years cutoff details are tabulated below for different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories, etc. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive specialisations were B.Tech. in Information Technology, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering and B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, with WBJEE last round closing ranks of 82575, 93696 and 94745, respectively. Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Lawn Tennis, Volleyball

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing engineering college. It has good placements and a food hostel facility.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is just amazing. The food is good. The hostel provides single rooms for 3rd year and 4th year students including 24x7 water supply and 5G internet. There is also a common room to play indoor games. The hostel provides a gym and a big basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good.
reviews.review_text: There are a good amount of labs with AC and classrooms. There is a library with a good amount of books. There is a Wi-Fi zone where students can sit and do chit-chat. The food is bad. Rooms are average but not so good. Medical facilities are good. Sports of different varieties are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Vibrant campus with excellent resources
reviews.review_text: The campus is a Wi-Fi zone for most areas, and laboratories offer high-speed internet. The classrooms are well-designed for a large number of students. The library has many books and a separate study zone with a very nice atmosphere. The classrooms are very airy and always give a vibe of study. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very nice with a water supply 24/7. The sports and games facilities are the best parts offering a number of opportunities for students.

reviews.review_heading: College standard is moderate.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of this college are so good. There are many classrooms, 10+ various labs, one Central library and also available a Wi-Fi facility. There is a separate boy and girl hostel facility. Hostel food is of medium quality.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of bad infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our hostel and classrooms, but the internet speeds are too slow. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the food available in the mess, and the canteen were very bad. Primary medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Work hard for job, Good placement in 2015, 2024 is not so good.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is enough for students, and the room is also good every time Wi-Fi is present. Some indoor games and quiz robotics clubs are present here. Every day and afternoon everyone plays friendly cricketer football, and many times casually they arrange a football for a cricket volleyball match.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a solid engineering education with quality infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available like Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms, water filters, etc. The quality of food in the hostel is average. A strict timetable is followed, and food is prepared according to the timetable. Three times meal is provided, and one grand fest happens every month.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The college maintains well-equipped classrooms with modern teaching aids such as projectors and whiteboards. However, periodic maintenance is required to address issues like seating comfort and lighting. Departments with specialized needs, such as engineering workshops, language labs, and art studios, provide students with hands-on learning opportunities and necessary resources.

reviews.review_heading: College of Engineering and Management, Kolaghat review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty simple. It has classrooms and labs, and the whole college has Wi-Fi connectivity. It also has a pretty big library. The hostel rooms are pretty fine and average. The quality of the food available in the mess is also quite average. There is a hospital beside the college for medical purposes. The college also conducts general sports championships. Also, the hostel campus has basketball and badminton courts.

reviews.review_heading: The shortest and loyal review of CEMK.
reviews.review_text: A strong network (Wi-Fi) is available in classrooms, libraries, and labs everywhere in colleges. The facilities of the network (Wi-Fi) and electricity are good in the hostel, and the quality of food in the mess and canteen is quite good. Near this college, a government hospital is there. Cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, and badminton games are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Before 2017 Cemk was the best college in our area. But after that it is not so good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and the library are good and in the hostel, each person has a LAN connection, which is very good. The hostel room was good and the college area is very big and also natural. Here, all the teachers teach us very easily and they help us in everything and also in our daily lives.

reviews.review_heading: College life at my institute is vibrant and diverse, overall it's a well-rounded experience for me.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are quite good. Hostel room facilities are average, with Wi-Fi available in each room. However, the hostel food falls short of expectations, lacking taste and variety. The meals are often repetitive and lack nutrition. Limited options leave residents longing for more diverse and palatable choices.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus with greenery and sports and games and fests are too good.
reviews.review_text: In our college there are 4 blocks. East block. It is a new block and modern library is here and book bank also. West block, it is in the front of our college and 1st tears classes are held here and all head of the department rooms are here. South block, here all labs exist and the last one is north block, all department theory classes are here. When I come to hostel it is totally different. Rooms are well lighted and well maintained too. Rooms are so crazy.

reviews.review_heading: College of Engineering and Management, Kolaghat: A brief review by a student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and the hostel is quite good. The college building is well decorated and the hostels are managed by some workers to maintain cleanliness. Classrooms have projectors, labs have fast Wi-Fi connections, and there is also a library.

reviews.review_heading: Unreveling The Beautiful Truth.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good with 24x7 electricity facility. The courses and departments are well-equipped. We have a flexible mess, and a canteen is also there. The labs and library are great. There is a KTTP hospital. We have lots of sports grounds where one gets the opportunity to play cricket, football, volleyball, basketball, badminton, and many indoor games.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about CEM - College Of Engineering & Management

likes.text: Many popular and reputed companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Cognizant visit our college and offer jobs.

likes.text: There are different buildings for different years and also a canteen for each building, and we also have a relaxing room with TV, table-tennis, carrom board.
The campus is huge with air-conditioned labs, very few auditoriums, well-furnished hostels, medical facilities and a hospital.

review_content.General: Facilities are good. Food is average, not bad, and network connection is good for Airtel, not other networks. The infrastructure is good, the canteen is neat and clean, and the food is very nice. Our department is well-equipped with modern facilities and infrastructure that support both academic and practical learning. Spacious classrooms with smart boards and projectors make the teaching process more interactive. Entire campus is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi, allowing students to access digital resources at any time. Laboratories are well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Average college, but offers good value for money. Faculty is actively working hard to improve.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% students get placed on campus, and out of the rest, a few find off-campus placements. (Varies each year, mean value is mentioned.) For the 2024-25 batch, the highest package is 6.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.5-3 LPA, and the average is in the range of 3-4 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Kaar Technologies, Hexaware, and Capgemini are the top recruiters (highest to lowest). Internships are mandatory from the 2nd year onwards, but students must find them. Training sessions from Matrimony.com and Capgemini are conducted for pre-final and final year students. Top roles include Software Development Engineer in Java, Web Developer, and IT Consultant.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good place to explore new learning and campus life.

review_content.Placements: Top MNCs offer high packages with well-trained placement classes from the 2nd year itself to train up the students for attending interviews for top companies, and they also ensure placement opportunities. They also train up all department students with coding knowledge to get placed in top IT companies with good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good and neat with all facilities, including free Wi-Fi, snacks, a study table, separate beds, restrooms, and non-veg food available every day. Nice environment for both studies and enjoyment, with joyful surroundings to achieve success in your life. They also give us a super environment to explore new things and inventions by assisting with good staff and support.

review_summary.college_name: Vel Tech High Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for placement and studies.

content.Placements: In the recent batch of the IT department, 70%-80% UG students got placed through campus drives. The highest package offered touched approximately 30 LPA-35 LPA, while the lowest package is about 3 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. Some of the top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Deloitte, Cognizant, Zoho, and Amazon, with emerging product-based companies and start-ups. Nearly 70% to 80% of students secured internships and jobs. The roles offered are primarily Software Developer, Associate Engineer, Data Analyst, Cloud Engineer, and Front-end developer with a wide range of career paths.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with everything, not bad.

content.Placements: 90% of them are placed, but many of them are required only for skills, not for the mark. I would like to invite everyone to our college. The placement performance was quite encouraging. Nearly 75-80% of students were successfully placed through campus recruitment drives. The highest package offered was around 12 LPA, the lowest stood at approximately 3 LPA, while the average package was about 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, L&T, Hyundai, and Bosch, which offered diverse options.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Food is average, not bad, and network connection is good for Airtel, not other networks. The infrastructure is good, the canteen is neat and clean, and the food is very nice. Our department is well-equipped with modern facilities and infrastructure that support both academic and practical learning. Spacious classrooms with smart boards and projectors make the teaching process more interactive. Entire campus is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi, allowing students to access digital resources at any time. Laboratories are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college, but offers good value for money. Faculty is actively working hard to improve.

content.Placements: Almost 50% students get placed on campus, and out of the rest, a few find off-campus placements. (Varies each year, mean value is mentioned.) For the 2024-25 batch, the highest package is 6.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.5-3 LPA, and the average is in the range of 3-4 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Kaar Technologies, Hexaware, and Capgemini are the top recruiters (highest to lowest). Internships are mandatory from the 2nd year onwards, but students must find them. Training sessions from Matrimony.com and Capgemini are conducted for pre-final and final year students. Top roles include Software Development Engineer in Java, Web Developer, and IT Consultant.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good place to explore new learning and campus life.

content.Placements: Top MNCs offer high packages with well-trained placement classes from the 2nd year itself to train up the students for attending interviews for top companies, and they also ensure placement opportunities. They also train up all department students with coding knowledge to get placed in top IT companies with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The college is good and neat with all facilities, including free Wi-Fi, snacks, a study table, separate beds, restrooms, and non-veg food available every day. Nice environment for both studies and enjoyment, with joyful surroundings to achieve success in your life. They also give us a super environment to explore new things and inventions by assisting with good staff and support.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college to study in the academic session compared to other colleges

content.Placements: More than 300 companies signed agreements with our college, providing good placement opportunities, and the training for placement is very good. The teachers are teaching quantitative, logical, verbal, and coding skills, among many others, to help us get jobs in top MNCs. This helps us to gain our dream jobs in our dream companies.
content.Infrastructure: More than 3 labs for the same subject with highly improved systems, and physical fitness facilities such as sports, yoga, exercise, and a gym are available. There are more than 3 canteens with good food preparation at affordable prices to maintain physical fitness. The college provides cycling exercises.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vel Tech High Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Excellent hostel facilities ensure free cross ventilation and hygienic environment surrounded by vast expanse of lush green lawns, coconut and mango groves.
Separate accommodation for boys and girls.
Separate library inside the hostel and reading room facility.
Vast indoor and outdoor play fields.
Beauty parlour within the premises for both boys and girls.
Semi deluxe, deluxe (AC & non AC), super deluxe rooms and bath attached rooms.
Excellent communication services 24*7 with in the premises.
Gala entertainment followed by moonlit dinner every full moon night.
Excellent indoor and outdoor games facility.
Auditorium inside the girl’s hostel.
Temples and prayer halls for all faiths.

library.description:
College have two libraries one for Undergraduate Students and one for post graduate students.

UG Library: The under graduate library is fully computerized and contains 35,560volumes, 8896 Titles and 1861 CD’S are accessible. Besides these books and magazines, we have newspapers and Journals bought through subscription. The library has joined DelNet consortium and IEEE for e-journals access at discounted rates fixed by MHRD. This enables us to access the journals online. The College library provides Reference service, Bibliographic service, Inter library loan service, Reprographic service, CD-ROM search and Internet browsing facility.
The library has access to other institutions and provides membership to other libraries like Anna University Library card, Indian Institute of Technology Library card, American Library card and British council Library card.

PG Library: The Post graduate library is fully computerized and houses more than 11730 volumes 2932 Titles and 400 CD’s are available. Besides these news papers, journals and magazines are bought through subscription.
The library has joined INDEST consortium for e-journals access at discounted rates fixed by MHRD. This enables us to access the journals online. The college provides services like Reference service, Bibliographic service,   Inter library loan service, Reprographic service, CD-ROM search and Internet browsing facility.

Hostel life is comfortable, both AC and Non-AC rooms are available with furnished and good internet connection. The mess food is really good with both veg and non-veg options available, and there are enough sports, medical, and canteen facilities to keep both academics and daily life balanced.

Non-AC reading library and air-conditioned digital library with high-speed Ethernet are available for students and staff. Classrooms are good but not modern. Each class has a projector and screen. CCTV monitors classes, labs, and corridors. There are 4 different canteens as of 2025 with decent pricing and food taste. Limited veg options ...

They also give us a super environment to explore new things and inventions by assisting with good staff and support.

reviews.review_heading: Good life in Vel Teach High Teach.
reviews.review_text: The course currently I am pursuing is very well. The faculty members of the department are supportive in every situation and time. The ambiance of the hostel and rooms are perfect for student's living hood. The quality of the hostel is good, but the food provided is not up to the mark. Preferred either to adopt to it or take rooms at outside.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: In Vel Tech, the infrastructure is good. In the rainy season, there is no storage on campus the water is filtered to the pond. Labs are good in chemical engineering labs are excellent. There are many chemical equipments available in labs, and Wi-Fi connections are also good. Each floor and department has separate Wi-Fi connections. Classroom infrastructure is also good. In classrooms, there are 4 fans available and 7 lights are there in the classroom. Library hours are weekly twice, if any books...

reviews.review_heading: B.Teach in Chemical Engineering in tier III college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was meant to be accessed but you won't get it on campus unless you are in a hostel. Classrooms are good. The library had enough of what we needed for our syllabus and exams. The hostel was fine but it cost half the fee for your degree and the food is also not that good.

reviews.review_heading: The good college for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good and okay they were providing egg daily and when we need gym the. We can accumulate the gym easily and hostel facilitate both AC and non AC rooms for the students wish and hostel provide the evergreen environment to students for their refreshment.

reviews.review_heading: Best College campus Avadi.
reviews.review_text: Winner College campus there are there is very comfortable such as Wi-Fi is very speed and the lapse or Mini room many labs are available in our colleges and the many all classrooms are neat and the library or very perfect to search any books it is very it is useful for every student.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the academics, Good placement in 2024, & Infrastructure is averagely good.
reviews.review_text: As for the lab, they have installed the systems recently (i7 12th gen), and they have a Wi-Fi connection (Ethernet capable) in the lab only. As for the classroom and library, I will say that we have what we need. They do not have Wi-Fi on campus. They have a canteen. The food is very nice in the canteen, and they have medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Vel Tech High Tech College review.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, Wi-Fi, a gym, and yoga rooms are available. Each room has 5 beds, three students, and two attached bathrooms. Every room has five students. In our college hostel, there are two messes and three canteens. The actual food is very high quality and unlimited.

reviews.review_heading: Welcome to Vel Teach - A nature friendly campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides excellent Wi-Fi speed, and hygienic food is served in the hostel. Classrooms are equipped with projectors and screens. Laboratories have a 1 Gbps internet connection, and every activity room in the college has smart displays.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of college is average but the infrastructure of hostel is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are average, and the infrastructure is not good enough. In some areas of the campus, the Wi-Fi doesn't work properly, and we can't get a phone signal. However, the library facilities are good, and the placement cell is helpful. Sports are not a priority here, but the hostel infrastructure is excellent, and the food in the mess and canteen is average. The hostel is located on campus.

reviews.review_heading: A College life of Vtht Avadi.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good enough. The Wi-Fi is there, and they also give passwords, but I don't work. I have not used college Wi-Fi for one day either. The lab is good though, and hostel food will be average. If we go late, then lunch will be over. There is also a medical room, 3 canteens, and sports. Sports is important for our college .

answer.text: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

answer.text: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

answer.text: The BTech IT course leads to a lot of earning opportunities for graduates to work on a platter. You can enter into industries such as IT advisory and consulting, healthcare, education, banking, trade, and commerce, etc.You can work as IT Engineer, IT Specialist, Mobile App Developer, Computer Programmer, Networking Systems Administrator, Database Administrator, Web Developer, Cyber Security Analyst, and many more profiles. The average BTech IT salary in India is also quite decent for fresh graduates, between INR 4 LPA and INR 7 LPA.Reference Link Information Technology Career Scope

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: SNJB civil branch review.

content.Placements: I'm from the Department of Civil Engineering of SNJB College. In the year 2023, around 50 percent of the students were placed. The highest package was around 7 LPA, the lowest package was 1 LPA. The average package was around 2 LPA-3 LPA. Top recruiters are Rohan Builder, Anand Developer, Arihant Buildcon, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.

content.Placements: In the previous year, 75 percent of the students are placed. The average package offered is 4 to 5 LPA, the lowest package offered is 2 LPA and the highest package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Tata, Mahindra, etc. More than 75 percent of students got internship. This course offers an opportunity in various construction fields or working as labour under the contractor.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.

content.Placements: In the previous years, more than 70 percent of the students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students secure internships in top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge library of our college called the central library, which contains numerous books for students related to academic and non-academic. Food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good greenery environment for study.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of the students got placed in the previous year. The highest package is around 10 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Around 70 percent of students got internships. Our top recruiters are TCS, Mahindra, Capgemini, Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, L&T Defence, and Bajaj Auto.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.

content.Placements: As a first-year student, I will be passing out in 2029. According to the official SNJB website, in the academic year 2023-24, 23 students were placed out of 60 in the AI & IT course. The highest package was 9.5 LPA. The lowest package was 1.2 LPA. The average package was 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Jaro Education, Byju's, Infosys, and Mahindra. Jaro Education provided a package of more than 8 LPA to 5 students in the 2023-24 academic year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: SNJB civil branch review.
reviews.review_text: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge li...

reviews.review_heading: Good greenery environment for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: It was a well-structured curriculum. It obviously helps if you know exactly what field you want your career in, but they also give us one year to figure out the subjects you want to do for your major. In the long term, it doesn't matter what subjects you studied. Hostel amenities are good. Hostel rooms are spacious, and we have single and shared basis hostels. Will be provided with wardrobes, individual beds, blankets, towels, pillows, tables and chairs. Also provides laundry facilities. Mess in...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering studies with average marks and income.
reviews.review_text: It is very good and very relevant in terms of the facilities and infrastructure at this college of engineering. The library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all top-class. The food available at the mess and canteen is so nice and tasty. For sports and games, we have a very big ground to play on.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The water and electricity facilities are good. The college is clean. The food served in the canteen is not good. Staff members are not good. They are not cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the degree.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities in my college are average, as the other local colleges have. Department of artificial intelligence and data Science is at very low stage in this college of engineering. Hostel facilities is such that they provide only Jain food to the students, and the non-Jain students have to eat the jain food in this hostel 
.

reviews.review_heading: The college is too good by each parameter like placements, campus life, education, safety, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fabulous; there are many engineering marvels in the college. You have to look towards our central building; it is fabulous. The classrooms are also fully digital; in each classroom, there is one digital board and comfortable benches for sitting purposes. The labs are also too good to do our job and the whole campus is fully WI-FI connected. The hostel facility is also very good; there is also a WI-FI facility is available and many other things are good about the hostel, lik...

reviews.review_heading: An honest feedback of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are different classrooms for separate batches and years. There is a separate department for M.Pharma and B.Pharma. The college has labs for practicals. There is a Library with reading books and a digital library as well. The facilities in the hostel are good. The food is very good and medical facilities are also there. They have a Gymkhana and sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Hostel for girls and boys are available. Which have great facilities. There is different hostel for boys and girls and long distance between both hostels. Food quality is also good of hostels both hostels. One day of week had special treat.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best campus. The infrastructure of our college is very good. All facilities are available in our college. All classrooms are very huge and clean. Labs, a library, and Wi-Fi are available in our college. Hostels are available in our college for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary infrastructure, equipment, and a library are provided in our college. Classrooms have projectors, blackboards, and whiteboards. Labs have good equipment. Library has many books. Wi-Fi facility and canteen are available. The infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements count, good infrastructure, good cleanliness.
reviews.review_text: In my college they provide very good facilities. Whole campus contains Internet connectivity, labs, classrooms, library is also very good. Cleanliness is commendable. All the necessary facilities are available in the canteen, they are very good. All the important sports competitions are also held.
